Donald Trump has been displaying exorbitant displays of executive overreach: **turning our cities into police states, pressuring TX to draw up 5 more GOP seats, and attacking his political enemies.**

Democrats are fighting back. They're calling on CA lawmakers to redraw the state's congressional map to fight against the GOP’s gerrymandering scheme.

**The GOP knows that their agenda is deeply unpopular,** that’s why they're trying to rig the maps because _they know_ we have what it takes to defeat them.

**With New Dems’ members defending 20 of the 26 most competitive frontline seats this cycle,** _it’s more critical than ever that we win in 2026._

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Election Law Battle at Supreme Court Heats Up
body:
Historic Supreme Court Argument Set

[INSIDE JW]

SUPREME COURT SETS ARGUMENT ON ILLINOIS’ POST–ELECTION BALLOT
COUNTING

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35866&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0yQ3dxMVRtTU5xOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=988d3c729607d674e7e01ea90b4b93d8e9a43181f07b3c23296231e220eb6346]

Our fight for the rule of law in elections is moving forward at the
U.S. Supreme Court.

The Supreme Court just scheduled oral argument
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35864&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9vcmFsX2FyZ3VtZW50cy9hcmd1bWVudF9jYWxlbmRhcnMvTW9udGhseUFyZ3VtZW50Q2FsT2N0b2JlcjIwMjUucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1549905422797a4d5bf7e8a1fb1ccb4f21b70414ce4ce0ebbc6ac18508e5fead]
for October 8, 2025, in our lawsuit on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost
and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate
their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending ballot counting
for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

On July 22, we announced that we filed our opening brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35722&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGlzdG9yaWMtZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5LWNhc2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b98629dfd965c95f806dbcf1fb6bde75f35de446df9589dd08a2a8726976a403]
to
the Supreme Court in this case (_Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura
Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of
Elections and Bernadette Matthew_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35867&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvXV9zXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5691475464f7bc06960af25ebcf548fdba96e10c72e4690ade127ba296cc8d00
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=28345&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f4376e8898ff95bf9e3947157b9ae5b6c5656a891d5567d3dadc20895ed43f3c
_(No.
1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

In June, the Supreme Court agreed to hear
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35335&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NvdHVzLWVsZWN0aW9uLWxhdy1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4841abe7f2172ec048918b2b4dc7f3bb885d8869c1c3c70c07bd660c90d5538b]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NvdHVzLWVsZWN0aW9uLWxhdy1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvXW91cj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=62a0b9127272bcf4b3211aec89aabc354a5411b26cfa6192d3debb01dc464832
appeal of the decision
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=33940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=200db680ce3c703e447d311dde7b46d7b573ff10009ce8fd96a03975cfd9caab]
of the
U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in this case. The lower
courts had denied that Bost and the electors had standing to challenge
Illinois’ practice of counting ballots received up to 14 days after
Election Day. The Election Day lawsuit was initially filed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
on May 25, 2022.

Our Supreme Court brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35707&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtc2NvdHVzLWJyaWVmLTAyNzU0LTI2NDQtNTY4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3a30b634aa43d688b087924956aca5ad4734fdf3d0308b58ebe537cd59f9b434]
states:

> Federal law sets the first Tuesday after the first Monday in
> November as the federal Election Day.

***

> Candidates have an obvious interest in the lawfulness and fairness
> of the rules that govern the elections into which they pour their
> time and resources. They also have an obvious interest “in
> ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally
> valid votes cast.”

***

> Candidates pour enormous resources into running for election and
> have an obvious interest in the rules that dictate how long their
> races will last and how the ballots will be counted. They also have
> a distinct interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally
> accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.”

This is a historic election law challenge. Too many courts have denied
candidates their right to challenge unlawful election rules such as
the outrageous act of counting ballots that arrive AFTER Election Day.
American citizens concerned about election integrity will tune in
closely to Judicial Watch’s Supreme Court arguments on October 8.

As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting
rights. As part of its work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly
experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory
elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls across the country,
among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9397a9e3d745abe0c3f21cda7e7ee80355607c49f190c9e5632b403f671aff4b].

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

Paul Clement, who has argued more than 100 cases before the Supreme
Court, is representing Congressman Bost and the electors with us
before the Supreme Court. Clement is former solicitor general under
President George W. Bush from 2005-2008 and is widely regarded as
among the top Supreme Court litigators in the country.

T. Russell Nobile, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, is part of our
voting integrity efforts and focuses on campaign and voting issues,
civil rights issues, constitutional law, official misconduct by public
institutions and officials, and other issues.

Eric Lee is an attorney at Judicial Watch, where he focuses on
enforcing federal and state laws that promote transparency and
integrity in the electoral process. Eric graduated with his B.A. from
St. Mary’s College of Maryland and received his J.D. from the
University of Maryland School of Law. He is licensed to practice in
California, Maryland, the District of Columbia, and in federal courts
in Illinois and Colorado.

We recently filed a brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35857&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NvdHVzLWJhbGxvdHMtYWZ0ZXItZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8039c961bba2a9cb6c71b33c4e6d4beb3d402d9723566bbcbc1edde975f371a6]
to
the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi, opposing the State of Mississippi’s attempt to overturn
the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision, which
struck down a law allowing ballots received after Election Day to be
counted.

Federal courts for Oregon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35830&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb3JlZ29uLXZvdGVyLXJvbGwtY2xlYW51cC0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=268c968acceaea353e51054ab5449db88b31ac85981eedf6757cf33b6b6d6d45],
California and Illinois
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35799&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdHMtdG8tY2xlYW4tdXAtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3ffca2533bc2dd25e07948d2d4a3492d4dca7643bff693d9ece8d8bc8133401b]
have
ruled that our lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them
to clean their voter rolls.

We announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35168&F=T&&hash=54a98dc0af766e1e8cc838fce97a5fdf7566055cdbed1702d666a75e847d5956]
in May that our work led to the removal of more than five million
ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide.

JUDICIAL WATCH URGES SUPREME COURT TO PRESERVE RESPECT FOR ELECTION
DAY

The Supreme Court is now considering whether to take up a challenge to
Judicial Watch’s historic victory essentially outlawing the counting
of ballots received after Election Day in several states. On behalf of
the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, we filed a brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35846&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21zLXYtcm5jLXNjb3R1cy1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktd3JpdC0yNC0xMjYwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b996bd337e1045eea41b9d6722fe5ca53e29e4aad9f09454b6e746b440f298d]
with the U.S. Supreme Court opposing the State of Mississippi’s
attempt to overturn
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=34793&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdm90ZXMtYWZ0ZXItZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c0f3568420a376267ec55d2667e6ff169135ee4f00825fb2d6696fb02eb9cfbb]
the U.S.
Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision striking down a
law allowing the counting of ballots received after Election Day
(_Michael Watson, Mississippi Secretary of State v. Republican
National Committee, et al.,_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35869&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21zLXYtcm5jLXNjb3R1cy1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktd3JpdC0yNC0xMjYwL10oTm8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=82963b47aca4264c4af9fa5ab91cf52a20a3499aa11b8956b2502c62d0bc363f.
24-1260)).

The October 25, 2024, Fifth Circuit appellate opinion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=34781&F=T&&hash=9a03da0f39a326b1583d9b03b2fba14021abdf4ced5af55fc691c141b692340d]
found:

> Congress statutorily designated a singular “day for the
> election” of members of Congress and the appointment of
> presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice
> confirm this “day for the election” is the day by which ballots
> must be both cast by voters and received by state officials. Because
> Mississippi’s statute allows ballot receipt up to five days after
> the federal election day, it is preempted by federal law. We reverse
> the district court’s contrary judgment and remand for further
> proceedings.

Our brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35846&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21zLXYtcm5jLXNjb3R1cy1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktd3JpdC0yNC0xMjYwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b996bd337e1045eea41b9d6722fe5ca53e29e4aad9f09454b6e746b440f298d]
argues that the Supreme Court should refuse to review the Fifth
Circuit ruling:

> [T]he Court of Appeals correctly applied existing Court precedent to
> find that the Receipt Deadline is inconsistent and conflicts with
> the Election Day statutes, and is preempted by them. Petitioner [MS
> secretary of state] has not demonstrated any reason why the
> Court’s intervention is needed now. Modification of the Election
> Day receipt deadline allows states to “engage in gamesmanship,
> experiment with deadlines, and renew the very ills Congress sought
> to eliminate: fraud, uncertainty, and delay.”

We initially filed the civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=31320&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnRpbmctYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=30445c04db80403014cf6801c0a539109bdf148b2ee17d0c66123ba49e0dfac1]
in
February 2024 on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi,
challenging the same Mississippi election law permitting absentee
ballots to be received as long as five business days after Election
Day. The suit was consolidated with one filed by the Republican
National Committee, the Mississippi Republican Party, and other
complainants.

In March 2025, the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=34793&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdm90ZXMtYWZ0ZXItZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c0f3568420a376267ec55d2667e6ff169135ee4f00825fb2d6696fb02eb9cfbb]
its previous
ruling, in which it agreed with Judicial Watch that it was unlawful
for Mississippi to count ballots that arrived after Election Day. The
full Circuit declined to hear the case by a vote of 5 to 10.

Our brief recounts:

> In reversing the district court on the merits, the [Fifth Circuit]
> panel faithfully followed this Court’s precedent ... [T]his Court
> found that the Election Day statutes preempted a Louisiana law that
> allowed congressional candidates to be elected in October.... In
> interpreting the meaning of “day of the election” within the
> Election Day statutes, this Court found that “[w]hen the federal
> statutes speak of ‘the election’ of a Senator or Representative,
> they plainly refer to the combined actions of voters and officials
> meant to make a final selection of an officeholder.” ...
> Accordingly, the “day of the election” “may not be consummated
> prior to federal election day.”

On July 22, we filed our opening brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=35722&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGlzdG9yaWMtZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5LWNhc2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b98629dfd965c95f806dbcf1fb6bde75f35de446df9589dd08a2a8726976a403]
to
the Supreme Court in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost
and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate
their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for
14 days beyond the date established by federal law (_Rep. Michael J.
Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board
of Elections and Bernadette Matthews_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=27398&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1033b643b5b4dce9478276ccc789909c6356f79935c2f70c013984bcaf3b645c]
(No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). Initially filed in May 2022,
this was the first challenge
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
seeking to require all ballots be received by Election Day.

In March 2025, we filed a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=34772&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmFsbG90cy1yZWNlaXZlZC1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4c35f56617ad58c6489f018f4427a297e3b065189372590fbb86fed463faa76a]
against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent
state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days
beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots
received up to seven days after Election Day (_Darrell Issa v. Shirley
N. Weber, in her official capacity_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76001&L=34746&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lzc2Etdi13ZWJlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY29tcGxhaW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=90a17399bd119174a4f593e03a3e6ce941aa400fbaa6367e91434eb3106cd322]
(No. 3:25-cv-00598)).

Counting ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation
of federal law and encourages fraud and voter distrust. Let us hope
that the Supreme Court will decline to hear Mississippi’s senseless
attempt to overturn a historic decision that sensibly concluded that
counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful.

clean_body: Historic Supreme Court Argument Set [INSIDE JW] SUPREME COURT SETS ARGUMENT ON ILLINOIS’ POST–ELECTION BALLOT COUNTING [] Our fight for the rule of law in elections is moving forward at the U.S. Supreme Court. The Supreme Court just scheduled oral argument [] for October 8, 2025, in our lawsuit on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending ballot counting for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. On July 22, we announced that we filed our opening brief [] to the Supreme Court in this case (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthew [ [ (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). In June, the Supreme Court agreed to hear [] [ appeal of the decision [] of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in this case. The lower courts had denied that Bost and the electors had standing to challenge Illinois’ practice of counting ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day. The Election Day lawsuit was initially filed [] on May 25, 2022. Our Supreme Court brief [] states: Federal law sets the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November as the federal Election Day. * Candidates have an obvious interest in the lawfulness and fairness of the rules that govern the elections into which they pour their time and resources. They also have an obvious interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.” * Candidates pour enormous resources into running for election and have an obvious interest in the rules that dictate how long their races will last and how the ballots will be counted. They also have a distinct interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.” This is a historic election law challenge. Too many courts have denied candidates their right to challenge unlawful election rules such as the outrageous act of counting ballots that arrive AFTER Election Day. American citizens concerned about election integrity will tune in closely to Judicial Watch’s Supreme Court arguments on October 8. As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of its work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls across the country, among other achievements []. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. Paul Clement, who has argued more than 100 cases before the Supreme Court, is representing Congressman Bost and the electors with us before the Supreme Court. Clement is former solicitor general under President George W. Bush from 2005-2008 and is widely regarded as among the top Supreme Court litigators in the country. T. Russell Nobile, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, is part of our voting integrity efforts and focuses on campaign and voting issues, civil rights issues, constitutional law, official misconduct by public institutions and officials, and other issues. Eric Lee is an attorney at Judicial Watch, where he focuses on enforcing federal and state laws that promote transparency and integrity in the electoral process. Eric graduated with his B.A. from St. Mary’s College of Maryland and received his J.D. from the University of Maryland School of Law. He is licensed to practice in California, Maryland, the District of Columbia, and in federal courts in Illinois and Colorado. We recently filed a brief [] to the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, opposing the State of Mississippi’s attempt to overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after Election Day to be counted. Federal courts for Oregon [], California and Illinois [] have ruled that our lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean their voter rolls. We announced [] in May that our work led to the removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide. JUDICIAL WATCH URGES SUPREME COURT TO PRESERVE RESPECT FOR ELECTION DAY The Supreme Court is now considering whether to take up a challenge to Judicial Watch’s historic victory essentially outlawing the counting of ballots received after Election Day in several states. On behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, we filed a brief [] with the U.S. Supreme Court opposing the State of Mississippi’s attempt to overturn [] the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision striking down a law allowing the counting of ballots received after Election Day (Michael Watson, Mississippi Secretary of State v. Republican National Committee, et al., [. 24-1260)). The October 25, 2024, Fifth Circuit appellate opinion [] found: Congress statutorily designated a singular “day for the election” of members of Congress and the appointment of presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice confirm this “day for the election” is the day by which ballots must be both cast by voters and received by state officials. Because Mississippi’s statute allows ballot receipt up to five days after the federal election day, it is preempted by federal law. We reverse the district court’s contrary judgment and remand for further proceedings. Our brief [] argues that the Supreme Court should refuse to review the Fifth Circuit ruling: [T]he Court of Appeals correctly applied existing Court precedent to find that the Receipt Deadline is inconsistent and conflicts with the Election Day statutes, and is preempted by them. Petitioner [MS secretary of state] has not demonstrated any reason why the Court’s intervention is needed now. Modification of the Election Day receipt deadline allows states to “engage in gamesmanship, experiment with deadlines, and renew the very ills Congress sought to eliminate: fraud, uncertainty, and delay.” We initially filed the civil rights lawsuit [] in February 2024 on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, challenging the same Mississippi election law permitting absentee ballots to be received as long as five business days after Election Day. The suit was consolidated with one filed by the Republican National Committee, the Mississippi Republican Party, and other complainants. In March 2025, the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear [] its previous ruling, in which it agreed with Judicial Watch that it was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots that arrived after Election Day. The full Circuit declined to hear the case by a vote of 5 to 10. Our brief recounts: In reversing the district court on the merits, the [Fifth Circuit] panel faithfully followed this Court’s precedent ... [T]his Court found that the Election Day statutes preempted a Louisiana law that allowed congressional candidates to be elected in October.... In interpreting the meaning of “day of the election” within the Election Day statutes, this Court found that “[w]hen the federal statutes speak of ‘the election’ of a Senator or Representative, they plainly refer to the combined actions of voters and officials meant to make a final selection of an officeholder.” ... Accordingly, the “day of the election” “may not be consummated prior to federal election day.” On July 22, we filed our opening brief [] to the Supreme Court in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [] (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). Initially filed in May 2022, this was the first challenge [] seeking to require all ballots be received by Election Day. In March 2025, we filed a federal lawsuit [] against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots received up to seven days after Election Day (Darrell Issa v. Shirley N. Weber, in her official capacity [] (No. 3:25-cv-00598)). Counting ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of federal law and encourages fraud and voter distrust. Let us hope that the Supreme Court will decline to hear Mississippi’s senseless attempt to overturn a historic decision that sensibly concluded that counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful. DOZENS OF PRISONERS RELEASED FROM GITMO REENGAGING IN TERRORIST ACTIVITIES Once a terrorist, always a terrorist? It seems that way, and yet leftists in our government keep releasing terrorists who go right back to terrorism, our Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [ Over a decade after the U.S. government offered a $5 million reward [] for information on the whereabouts of an Al Qaeda operative it released from the military prison at Guantanamo Bay (“Gitmo”) an intelligence report reveals that, like him, dozens of detainees freed from the compound have rejoined terrorist missions. They are part of the hundreds of Gitmo terrorists discharged over the years under a controversial program that started with President George W. Bush and continued full throttle under the Obama administration. Numerous military and intelligence reports have for years documented that many of the captives return to terrorism after leaving the top security prison at the Naval station in southeast Cuba. As far back as 2010 Obama’s National Intelligence Director disclosed [] [ one in four men incarcerated at Gitmo resume terrorist activities against the United States after being released even as the former president worked to fulfill his promise of returning America to the “moral high ground” by closing the detention facility. At the time 150 former Gitmo prisoners were confirmed or suspected of “reengaging in terrorist or insurgent activities after transfer,” the then Director of National Intelligence (DNI) told Congress. At least 83 “remain at large” and if additional detainees are released, some will “reengage in terrorist or insurgent activities,” the 2010 DNI assessment stated. Years earlier the Pentagon’s Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA) had acknowledged a sharp rise in the number of Gitmo detainees who rejoin terrorist missions after leaving U.S. custody. Using data such as fingerprints, pictures, and other reports the defense agency, which gathers foreign military intelligence, determined that the number of Middle Eastern terrorists who returned to “the fight” after discharge from Gitmo nearly doubled in a short time. All these years later, as some Democrats and their leftist allies insist on closing the prison, the recidivism issue persists. The facility still houses the world’s most dangerous Islamic terrorists, including 9/11 masterminds Khalid Sheikh Mohammed (KSM), Ramzi Binalshibh, Ali Abdul Aziz Ali, and Mustafa Ahmed Adam al Hawsawi as well as USS Cole bomber Abd al-Rahim al-Nashiri. But many dangerous, once classified “forever” prisoners, have been let go and present a grave national security threat. The Al Qaeda operative, Ibrahim al-Rubaysh, that the government offered a multi-million-dollar reward for after the Gitmo release is a senior Sharia official and advisor [] of the terrorist organization, according to the State Department. Other examples of recidivism among freed Gitmo jihadists include dozens who have rejoined Al Qaeda in Yemen, the country where the 2009 Christmas Day airline bomber proudly trained, and several high-ranking Al Qaeda militants in Yemen involved in a sophisticated scheme to send bombs on a U.S.-bound cargo plane. A Gitmo alum named Mullah Abdul Rauf, who once led a Taliban unit, established the first Islamic State in Iraq and Syria (ISIS) base in Afghanistan. Another, Sabir Mahfouz Lahmar, was arrested in France as part of a terrorist cell that operated an ISIS recruiting network. The latest report [] [ by the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) reveals that of 739 prisoners released from Gitmo, 137 are “confirmed of reengaging” in terrorist activities and 97 are suspected of doing so, which means they likely are. “Based on trends identified during the past 20 years, we assess that some detainees currently at GTMO will seek to reengage in terrorist or insurgent activities after they are transferred,” the recently declassified ODNI document states. “Transfers to countries with ongoing conflicts and internal instability as well as recruitment by terrorist or insurgent organizations could pose an increased risk of reengagement.” The ODNI further reveals that former Gitmo detainees routinely communicate with each other, families of former detainees and members of terrorist organizations. Intelligence officials have determined that planning terrorist operations is among the reasons for the communication. The Biden administration released the latest batch of terrorists from Gitmo, 11 Yemenis [] [ to Oman in early January. There are currently 15 of the world’s most dangerous jihadists at the military prison that once incarcerated 779. For years Judicial Watch has traveled to Gitmo to observe and report on the military tribunal trials of 9/11 terrorists and others, including USS Cole bomber al-Nashiri. Judicial Watch also covers all the hearings held by the Obama-created parole panel known as the Periodic Review Board via satellite video feed at the Pentagon. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently.
* **As a longtime organizer,** I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365.
* **As the only Gen Z member,** I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me.
* **As someone who grew up working class** and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to _uplift_ working class folks - not demonize them.

**And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars.** I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. **[**_But I know that with your help, I’ll stay here the same way I got here: one dollar at a time. clean_body: | ~ | Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) ~ But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently. As a longtime organizer, I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365. As the only Gen Z member, I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me. As someone who grew up working class and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to uplift working class folks - not demonize them. And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars. I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | - | ~~ Grateful for your support, Rep. Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today?** | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Did you catch Lauren’s message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This goal is critical to continue funding everything Pramila’s campaign does.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250815-5345-footer&t=1&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)
Hi Peter, Team Pramila here with a quick update on our mid-month goal!
Earlier today Lauren announced our mid-month goal of raising $7,500 before midnight tonight, and the response we’ve seen so far has been fantastic!
**Right now we’re just $3,750 away, and we’re counting on your help to get there before midnight.[Will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250815-3?refcode=em20250815-5345&amount=3&refcode2=5345_420207_S8hlpw&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)**
This goal is critical to continue funding everything Pramila’s campaign does, from year-round organizing, to the Resistance Lab, and more. So read more from Lauren below and then [**pitch in before midnight if you can!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250815-3?refcode=em20250815-5345&amount=3&refcode2=5345_420207_S8hlpw&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)
— Team Pramila
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Subject: Our campaign doesn’t stop during the summer
Hi Firstname, Lauren here, Campaign Manager for Pramila for Congress.
One of the things I’ve learned in my time working on campaigns is that **fundraising slows down during the summer** — and this year is no different!
There’s a lot of different reasons why that happens. Parents are busy with kids out of school, families take vacations, and people want to enjoy the warmth outside and away from their screens.
**But despite the warm weather, we still have goals to meet!**
Our campaign doesn’t stop during the summer, and funding everything from the Resistance Lab and our back-to-school drive to our year-round organizing program takes resources.
And since we’re currently tracking behind where we need to be at this point in August, I’m coming to you for help.
[**We’ve set a mid-month goal of raising $7,500 before tonight at midnight. Will you pitch in $3 to help us hit that goal and get through the summer fundraising slowdown?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250815-3?refcode=em20250815-5345&amount=3&refcode2=5345_420207_S8hlpw&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250815-3?amount=3&refcode=em20250815-5345&refcode2=5345_420207_S8hlpw&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)**
Thanks so much for everything you do,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250815-5345-footer&t=2&refcode2=5345_420207_S8hlpw&akid=5345%2E420207%2ES8hlpw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: All eyes are on our numbers
body:
---
Derek, This week officially marks mid-August, which means we’re closing in on our next FEC fundraising deadline. **After this deadline passes, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised this month and the number of donations we’ve received.** Here is the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking to see our total. This deadline is critical to showing Trump and his allies that there is powerful opposition to their agenda to gerrymander away Democrats’ voting power so that they can maintain control of Congress and continue handing out tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy at the expense of everyone else. Let’s show the Republicans just how strong we are together. **If you’ve been looking for a way to fight back against Trump and his allies, here’s where we ask:** [**Please consider making a $3 contribution to the DNC today to help us gather the resources we’ll need to hold Trump accountable and take back Congress:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250815_4309_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4309_22930333_BHEZl6&akid=4309%2E22930333%2EBHEZl6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250815_4309_fr&refcode2=4309_22930333_BHEZl6&akid=4309%2E22930333%2EBHEZl6)**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

name: Josh Harder
subject: Can I count on you tonight, Peter?
body:
We’re in serious jeopardy. | | Hey Peter, Michael’s right — if we don’t hit our goal tonight, we’ll be too far behind to catch up. And honestly, that’s a _scary_ place to be. Falling short would put our seat in serious jeopardy. We risk losing the House and giving Trump two more years of unchecked power. I can’t let that happen, but I can’t stop it alone. [_**There are only 5 hours left. name: Danielle Franz
subject: Conservatives don’t care about the environment
body:
It’s funny how this misperception has taken hold.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc5manv7qn79e48inmav4ftohpbp6ttgm58q2sp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
Friend,

_“Conservatives don’t care about the environment.”_

That’s what my liberal friend told me when I co-founded the American Conservation Coalition.

It’s funny how this misperception has taken hold.

Because here’s the truth...

Conservationists are overwhelmingly hunters and fishermen. The people in rural parts of our country are mostly conservative. The best environmental stewards I know are conservative.

So why does this misperception, this outright LIE, exist?

**ONE** : The liberal mainstream media has lied to the public for decades, and people have bought into it.

**TWO** : For the last few decades, the environmental movement has been hijacked by radical left-wing activists who put ideology over true conservationism. Instead of focusing on stewardship of our natural resources, they embraced anti-humanist, anti-capitalist, and alarmist ideas.

For too long, radical activists have used the environment as a means to their radical ends of socialism.

What if conservatives took back the environmental cause?

What if we built the largest environmental movement without a radical ideology?

What if we believed economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand?

_We can. _

**If you care deeply and passionately about stewarding our land and building a conservative environmental movement, then I am personally asking you to invest in our movement right now. **

[_**Can you chip in $10 or more today to support the American Conservation Coalition (ACC)? Click here to donate ANY amount >>**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ekiag8av2guri26haims8lu4beup5cvng74l1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

ACC’s mission is to build the conservative environmental movement. We have over 80,000 members.

And I am personally inviting you to join the team.

**Passion for conservation comes from patriotism.**

The United States is the most beautiful country. From the Smoky Mountains to the Pacific beaches, from Lake Michigan to the Gulf of America, we have boundless natural beauty and resources.

We _can_ be energy independent and protect our lands.

We can be the top economic powerhouse and enjoy the most beautiful National Parks.

_**We can leave a legacy for future generations. **_

But if I’m being honest, I sometimes wonder why the misperception of conservatives still exists.

And here’s my answer.

Because we haven’t built a big enough movement to rival the Sierra Club and other organizations that have, historically, dominated the environmental debate.

That time is over.
[_**Please support American Conservation Coalition today by donating $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, or ANY amount you can generously spare. **_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z42tiesu51115r2edchpgk17h55s313k6akke5k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0qfh816uibueck5nrkj705de2hq25kmvlarc3p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
[Donate $35
Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhqpcqne5kmbqqeokfqhlfvh4p9fppvo6c52kttg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3chf4s19nnekn46tbfir9f50r7891k6sqenc5d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs8bn5cc9kfs8b2j65ln82flabiosoed53c4sc8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu5qs3blaanmnjv6dlsf3lemjsd7g1bft809jgso_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

Thank you for supporting our nation’s beautiful outdoors.

Danielle Franz, CEO

P.S. I want to share these photos of our members, young conservatives, out there winning for the environment.

[_**Please consider joining today and supporting these young conservatives.**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlr80vrl1hshr456lq6jj05o896opc36dqcftdh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcbu59dsqt5qp41o3ssfpst56llp554o6cdqekfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh8ntdq59gith15ng7js1koggq5jin6vhgldt1p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs) _**[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj5j6hncdhd6pjm0d4cb0kphrvnpqg3tv3a17g10_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)**_[Donate Now >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2v9m6pitf8dilt8d2i5tokpdkoqbbq1jmp4etag_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._

name: Nancy
subject: I was broken. Then Jesus offered me living water. Now,I’m running for Governor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m asking you to read my story

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg0iuu9o9j2ij0vh20s9jjdat9cev2flnliq2hj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z08ngdvc85rvg81f068d3qjfva0ke1n3nv80nf18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgaduc7knacnl4klaofv4ru05bdg9c0k97qafrt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
| | **[There’s an old story in Scripture.__Maybe you know it.__](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd0mj9nlddtu6qrpqd85t7vqmjdujj168j8pvnm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)__** A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping **no one** would see her. But Jesus _**_did_**_ see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. [**He offered her living water.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8m7o237q5e78ih2b5dkbuhsfin1pdlca29iilq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs) She was stunned. Jesus said: **[“If you knew who I was, you would’ve asked me for a drink. And I would’ve given you living water.”](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv2eat3m4ckm4fl4jkotcvev17m9a7tgcbg17gdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** That story hits me deep— __**because I was that woman.**__ I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. **[But God doesn’t need perfection; He uses the broken to carry out His perfect plan.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmnkptd2ro09vctk4flreeu19q2lalfg7g6sjtso_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: **_Go back to school, or get a job._** **[So I got to work...at Waffle House. Graveyard shifts. Spatula in hand.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlhcmb7lbjsnb76anm28aca9fmr66hr94aq35gp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** It was humbling. It was hard. _**But it wasn’t the end of my story.**_ 25 years later, that high school dropout became the **first woman to graduate from The Citadel, and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6ebjlrt7b7392ut4huduqeadgupofti0ho3kfr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
[ **STAND WITH FIGHTER NANCY MACE** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zusl0engagbl04qp5nsi8ip3eipr3pc2o0aksvng_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
And I didn’t do it alone— _**God carried me**._ He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. **He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD.** **When I moved four times to _keep my children safe._** When the world called me unworthy, _**God called me redeemed.**_ When the Left tried to silence me, _**God gave me a voice.**_ When I had nothing left to give, _**God filled me with living water.**_ I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be _**rebuilt by grace.**_ **[This is more than politics. It’s a spiritual battle.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9kh28tst7jdoob1ttasi3svf872081p57u38cc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** A fight for **our churches** , our **daughters** , our **freedom** —and our __**souls.**__ _And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor._ **[Now I’m running for Governor, and I’m up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based Americans like you, Patriot.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh9tk3bm7nd3dt618emo7o4i5n8gbcmqkl09uqg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** If you believe in **grace** , **truth** , and **second chances** , **[I’m asking you to stand with me right now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi1h3tne2qhq5ip6hhl1rrjhfftna8v8mp7d07do_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)**
---
[ **SUPPORT NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdq3gj8gln9hii2hi7im1deunukol11cf4oiivn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well. **[Let’s show them:_God still sees them._](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze0tgcj5pccba4q5n3493nnbtoa9fvn12ol13h70_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)** And America still has fighters who won’t back down. **— Nancy Mace**
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zih2fdig2qhbb1mof1i8mheceiqcs5k2i306djl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
**P.S.** I know what it feels like to be overlooked. Ignored. Counted out. But I also know what it feels like to be used by God for a mission far bigger than myself. _**[If you're ready to join me, I’d be honored to fight alongside you.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zleqsgp0gijv7rs3gbt120ha2ltm445ltuhql4s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)**_
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqk3q23kci7blgqsc62ahtv5qg8kc902ik4b3c8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
| | [ **$25** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zureivf659gfvs517m0e53jmjlktf98dqts69usg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
[ **$50** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z19kj2b5gq0p7gsfkbifsd6k2hsmq9euo366f4n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
[ **$100** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo7p07h45q7p0vklgii4frugau22ta2bj36djr20_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
[ **OTHER AMOUNT** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znl0le6vi1ut44sv4ldemijbbalp3s1dddurjobg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61pb4c1h2bs)
---
**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

clean_body: I’m asking you to read my story | | | | | | | | | | A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping no one would see her. But Jesus did see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. She was stunned. Jesus said: That story hits me deep— because I was that woman. I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. It was humbling. It was hard. But it wasn’t the end of my story. 25 years later, that high school dropout became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina. And I didn’t do it alone— God carried me. He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD. When I moved four times to keep my children safe. When the world called me unworthy, God called me redeemed. When the Left tried to silence me, God gave me a voice. When I had nothing left to give, God filled me with living water. I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be rebuilt by grace. A fight for our churches , our daughters , our freedom —and our souls. And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor. If you believe in grace , truth , and second chances , Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well. And America still has fighters who won’t back down. — Nancy Mace P.S. I know what it feels like to be overlooked. Ignored. Counted out. But I also know what it feels like to be used by God for a mission far bigger than myself. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My oath:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdt5vgljlvudb63a1lr4bb08jcrnk5p04vlebq0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
**_“So help me God.”_**
---
On May 20, 1981, I raised my right hand and took an oath to defend the Constitution against all enemies, _foreign and domestic._
---
**So when President Trump asked me to serve as his lawyer and fight for his freedom and justice,_I did not hesitate even for a second!_
---
I took an oath: Justice _had_ to be done – _no matter the price_.
---
_And now, I’ve learned the price._
---
**I’m staring down a 20-year prison sentence in a case where the President _legally_ cannot issue a pardon to save me.**
---
**And after 52 YEARS of faithfully serving the law,_ALL_ of my law licenses have been taken away from me as a way to stop me from defending myself in court.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogovh2mskcrran47s30s720sqoi4vp7cu4og4go_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)
__
---

**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, _my ONLY chance was to hire a top-notch defense team_.**
---
_But through legal warfare, the Left pushed me to the brink of**BANKRUPTCY** – at one point, my Social Security and bank accounts were even FROZEN._
---
_President Trump once said that I had “guts” for defending him against the vengeful and bloodthirsty Deep State._
---
Truth be told, that wasn’t about courage – that was me simply honoring my oath.
---
**_But what I’m about to do right now will truly take guts..._**
---
_God knows I hate this, but I’m about to ask for your help._
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea – _a Hail Mary_ – to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
**_No matter what happens, I’m holding on to the final words of my oath: “ _So help me God_ ”._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my own freedom and justice**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0dfl8lrsjg6hbsg6np8msmjbmgj42n0ql5rt1o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpj61ob5c3h2bs)

__
---

---

Billy Graham was not only the world’s most influential evangelist—he was also a member of First Baptist Church in Dallas for more than 50 years. And now, as the current pastor of that same church, I’m honored to help carry his legacy forward through _Pathway to Victory_. Together, these resources will open your eyes to the unseen world around you—and encourage your faith in the One who commands it. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Socialism in America
body:
You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Socialism.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpbdeq3kcfsce7ocjn600g54remvgjnrslvevg8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm0oj1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zujh4gdtfbhbnskot5jgp8tqjfg79ifkcphnl3kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm0oj1c1h2bs)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn9ba5np38fla6lc1l8r06oce4ovuaa1tcfejm1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm0oj1c1h2bs)

In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**

You can easily make your gift after completing the **National Survey on Socialism**, which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgk05c1f8uduffd7ffqmgutajioq49pkfo81guo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm0oj1c1h2bs)

Warm regards,
Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My oath:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9ku3o2ljfeq0sshe8e59fftpuu1qh8ka3cjv10_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
**_“So help me God.”_**
---
On May 20, 1981, I raised my right hand and took an oath to defend the Constitution against all enemies, _foreign and domestic._
---
**So when President Trump asked me to serve as his lawyer and fight for his freedom and justice,_I did not hesitate even for a second!_
---
I took an oath: Justice _had_ to be done – _no matter the price_.
---
_And now, I’ve learned the price._
---
**I’m staring down a 20-year prison sentence in a case where the President _legally_ cannot issue a pardon to save me.**
---
**And after 52 YEARS of faithfully serving the law,_ALL_ of my law licenses have been taken away from me as a way to stop me from defending myself in court.**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcdor2l7qphpt8dnbfeeuc77tqdesl8d2068v1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs)
__
---

**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, _my ONLY chance was to hire a top-notch defense team_.**
---
_But through legal warfare, the Left pushed me to the brink of**BANKRUPTCY** – at one point, my Social Security and bank accounts were even FROZEN._
---
_President Trump once said that I had “guts” for defending him against the vengeful and bloodthirsty Deep State._
---
Truth be told, that wasn’t about courage – that was me simply honoring my oath.
---
**_But what I’m about to do right now will truly take guts..._**
---
_God knows I hate this, but I’m about to ask for your help._
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea – _a Hail Mary_ – to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
**_No matter what happens, I’m holding on to the final words of my oath: “ _So help me God_ ”._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my own freedom and justice**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrd2l5rl5637rkvc26tp4juu4b9o7u0q0tgpgu4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Billy Graham’s powerful message aboutangels—yours today
body:
If you’ve ever wondered about angels—who they are, what they do, or if they’re still active today—you’re not alone.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zllbtgn2td1evs9g3tj16vbku5r7n5u33rng3u7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, If you’ve ever wondered about angels—who they are, what they do, or if they’re still active today—you’re not alone. The Reverend Billy Graham asked those same questions. And in his powerful book _[Angels: God’s Secret Agents](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhah63c0j6u1dv95engdqspirqvlg42nkl7d5j8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs)_ , he offered biblical answers that still inspire and comfort believers today. Billy Graham was not only the world’s most influential evangelist—he was also a member of First Baptist Church in Dallas for more than 50 years. And now, as the current pastor of that same church, I’m honored to help carry his legacy forward through _Pathway to Victory_. Together, these resources will open your eyes to the unseen world around you—and encourage your faith in the One who commands it. Request your copy today: [https://secure.ptv.org/angels-generous-gift](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7roctfoedil3m1v6djja5hcdgsju17orudv3ka0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgm4o32c3h2bs) Gratefully, Dr. Robert Jeffress

These Democrats use **wheelchairs and walkers** to shuffle into Congress, can _BARELY put a sentence together_ , and the MAJORITY of Americans are thinking: Should there be Term Limits for members of Congress and the Senate?
**[Take the Term Limits Assessment NOW to DEMAND age limits for members of Congress and the Senate.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhpaalipitm2ca3j0hv1amd7c5haqo0382bvmcog_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmco72cph2bs)** **[TERM LIMITS ASSESSMENT](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvadnchss7bn5v3fitjf9ah1obbhdgh4615vgtg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmco72cph2bs)** Should term limits be enacted to protect America's integrity in Congress and the Senate?

If someone could barely walk and talk, would you want them running the country? **PROBABLY NOT.**_Especially if they are as CORRUPT and POISONOUS as Nancy Pelosi and Maxine Waters._
Most patriots, like you and me, agree that there must be term limits. We need your assessment answers to help enact new policies. __America is counting on you.__

**[Take the Term Limits Assessment NOW to STOP ancient skeletons like Nancy Pelosi from DESTROYING our country.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4nsukmuf9rcn4ec82elb9561rpasem1d6pmih2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmco72cph2bs)** **[TAKE THE ASSESSMENT NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zio8cu75ka3iahoupr3fag1ndl6954dt73n92cpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmco72cph2bs)**

body:
The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-h/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-r/) **August 15, 2025** Patriot,The grassroots are STRONG and ready for 2026! With so many events happening across the state, it is clear that Republicans are fired up and ready to win in 2026! Keep up the great work!If you aren't involved yet, don't miss out on all the fun. Take a look at the events below and join your local party. To find and join your county party, click [HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-y/).-Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****8/15-8/16: Brown County Fair

8/18: Juneau County GOP & Moms for Liberty

9/14: Jackson County Constitution Day Picnic
9/15: Juneau County GOP & Faith and Family Freedom**
**9/18: Juneau County GOP Pints and Politics
9/24: Jackson County Anticipating School Trends with Bill Hughes**
**9/27: Juneau County Lincoln Reagan Dinner**
**9/29: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Meeting**
**9/30: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Monthly Meeting
10/23: Juneau County GOP Pints and Politics
10/24: PRBC County Lincoln Reagan Trump Dinner
10/25: Jackson County Downtown Trick or Treat and Trail of Terror.
10/27: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Meeting** **Grant County**
Grant County Republicans hosted their Annual Summer Picnic this past week, August 7th, with over 70 attendees! Speakers included: Josh Schoemann (WI Gubernatorial Candidate), Bill Berrien (WI Gubernatorial Candidate), David Varnam (Potential WI Lieutenant Governor Candidate), John Leiber (WI State Treasurer), Howard Marklein (WI State Senator), Eric Toney (Fond du Lac County District Attorney), and Travis Tranel (WI State Representative). **Monroe County**
Republicans in Monroe County have been quite busy getting their message out. They staffed their county fair booth, held a great Conservative Breakfast featuring Monroe County Board Chairman Cedric Schnitzler, sponsored a hole in the Sparta Chamber of Commerce Annual Golf Outing, and participated in the Norwalk, WI, parade last Friday evening. They are keeping the "Heart of Wisconsin" Great!!! **Lincoln County**
Lincoln County Republicans showed up in force for their county fair and picnic! **Calumet County**
Calumet County hosted its monthly Conservative Citizens meeting, where attendees watched the "22 names" film followed by a Q&A with Laura from Moms for Liberty. **Buffalo County**
Buffalo County spent time meeting voters out at the Buffalo-Pepin County Fair! **Buffalo County**
Republicans in Buffalo County participated in the Mondovi Friendship Day parade and the Buffalo City 4th of July parade! **Green County **
The Green County Republican Party held its August breakfast meeting with a great crowd for guest speakers: Governor Candidate Bill Berrien, RPW Chairman Brian Schimming, and RPW Elections Director Jenna Banfield. It was a great morning to inspire and recruit election inspectors and develop strategies to win in 2026 !! **St. Croix County**
The Republican Party of St. Croix is keeping busy as always with a Packers Family Night with Raffle Winners, Hammond Heartland Days Parade, Community Prayer Meeting, and a Monthly Membership Meeting! **Columbia County**
The Columbia County Fair was in full swing, and both candidates for Wisconsin Governor stopped by to enjoy the sights, sample the tasty treats, and connect with the people of Columbia County. **Winnebago County**
Winnebago County Republicans were keeping busy the last few weeks with the county fair, Neenah/Menasha 3rd of July Parade, Oshkosh 4th of July Parade, and the Winneconne parade! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-j/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-d/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-k/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-qtdiruy-didthutlhu-u/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qtdiruy-l-o)

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: You have a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziv2qna5vvetos1aknm3pfn8l2te3mnfnqdetk2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmaor6c3h2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zemdludql1seir3caj35cfsrgjgup16rjrrfafmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmaor6c3h2bs)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zctig42stou41062j7or667gtftdmj8li532rhmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmaor6c3h2bs)**

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN ->**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjeug9jq9nrp113oaniiupgpuq3evhvbv1smv8bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cpgmaor6c3h2bs)

I grew up playing hockey. **I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11.** I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

__ I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat.

**I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance.**
