Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action.

clean_body: This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | Fellow Conservative, “Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.” Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values. They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it. As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions. And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but tofight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose. I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society. While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating. You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. I grew up playing hockey. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11. I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice. I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat. I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance. Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action. Thank you so much if you pitched in. We have big plans for this fall, and it's vital that we're able to fully fund them.

President Donald Trump said he and Russian President Vladimir Putin [made "great progress"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHOnDAQBeDTmG5WtjEsFBRp6P60KZEXD-wkg23Zw7_anD5ir5BupCe90fd-fS1fnpji_tMfOMmWloivyiiCZZFyHjmfQvFAlLCu6cglHVQXq20HegDTL8ETvxfXhGlDtNg2OJl717Xt0A-ueU4drs6bEcdgH6PvN_PQw910j601oxvQNTRdbXowvdHaOXtDs4390LdjH9bWjV45jYEkldvvRFGeuPE7fWO5reloeHqK5KraH8rOys7xnVOVK1J2voqVnfWg7Gyu66xw-ZSdPzZY2dNRYS_oBXJJe8FagSJ81HCxKe7wOAWeiUOFgOKJK6ycKkLGGK589cwVJMFfZIz1zxvwLCmjj-CZCa-HTZlCfhEz1f6unN4PT_whyH_t_j3ZfwEAAP__m6KaIQ) despite reaching no deal on Ukraine after a nearly three hour meeting in Anchorage, Alaska, Friday.

# Saturday, August 16, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1954, the first issue of _Sports Illustrated_ hit the newsstands, featuring a striking cover photo of Milwaukee Braves third baseman Eddie Mathews. His swinging bat is a blur against the dramatic backdrop of a crowded Milwaukee County Stadium. [Buy the first issue here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcFunDAURb_G7BjBszGwYJFp492kVRU17QoZ_DzjxMaWnxmUfn2V9BO6u9K9utLRebnMF-28265POuBUbJw3PMhjKZjnkveQ0l7cFhCLWdcYUo7B0QwNdHUz1K2cjXb-fRaVmSwiIK9wavuu43yQg6hu02JBD-2ouezl0rdcWCFkP44978CCxcpNH2_N0Mq2aYSAE7Z2lIPkozQrF6NmokHjSsyn1-i2ckPr3-Md82mNofLTrZREjD8wUAzUcRynVx2Q1j0Et9ES4xuh9__mDFTSVyQG6rNgoIBDDyMDRSnmQrXzfqeSdUFTW5ep1I5ox_oe_R6wjhvW2x4WzB-RcUWZfHGG8a8PNpy_xfTnaJZgslfuJzVm2db0_fm5w9E8_b5ccD_0F_X24xFeHu_p8O35_KvKk0mH896R7JlorkE7_wlX_svIfYK_AQAA__9mMqOE).

In today's _Et Cetera_ section, we tell the [story of a young woman](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAYhJ8Gd1jww2JcUESJ6PYSKUVKi4WfMwkYC7Pn7NtHzitcPdLMfN-v-3J3Kaft_c0VND3WZcPzyNg7tqW3Z9n3Z09bQezB-1r2Vks6FmBwo0xTrpbgUn4tcggmIgKKAQ2fbjchtNJyWE0UHufoPeNcQng8HH9w1F5DAKfiFIZkrjamueKMSQkj8jgrrcSsghdydkQyDKnXNv6uaesrxvyqH9hGX8uQzdr7fhDxhYAlYM_zHJ97ujIC9nsIyxueBwF7jRCwTBOwXBKwX5vr2GiN9FtypW7hoD-760h_uPaH3pNfsTWktv4lYDWHi4rrSUwzATs0E_Yz5ZwONRHJ3otL-f-h_imLHwb-BQAA__8Ke4Oa) who was adamant that she wanted to personally dig up a diamond for her engagement ring--and succeeded! Read about it below. ## Trump Says Progress Made in Putin Meeting
President Donald Trump said he and Russian President Vladimir Putin [made "great progress"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHOnDAQBeDTmG5WtjEsFBRp6P60KZEXD-wkg23Zw7_anD5ir5BupCe90fd-fS1fnpji_tMfOMmWloivyiiCZZFyHjmfQvFAlLCu6cglHVQXq20HegDTL8ETvxfXhGlDtNg2OJl717Xt0A-ueU4drs6bEcdgH6PvN_PQw910j601oxvQNTRdbXowvdHaOXtDs4390LdjH9bWjV45jYEkldvvRFGeuPE7fWO5reloeHqK5KraH8rOys7xnVOVK1J2voqVnfWg7Gyu66xw-ZSdPzZY2dNRYS_oBXJJe8FagSJ81HCxKe7wOAWeiUOFgOKJK6ycKkLGGK589cwVJMFfZIz1zxvwLCmjj-CZCa-HTZlCfhEz1f6unN4PT_whyH_t_j3ZfwEAAP__m6KaIQ) despite reaching no deal on Ukraine after a nearly three hour meeting in Anchorage, Alaska, Friday. The two leaders delivered brief remarks afterward but took no questions and shared no specifics about their talks. Trump said he will [call NATO leaders and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1urDAQwPHTmA7kL4wpXDzpiW6jdCmRwQM7iY0RHna1t4_YK6QcjfTX_ObrNt48RtzWD5_A0ZLHDZ4lAhEcIx1n2veTcEsAFOY5p_3ICcsouWxrbmthxuAxvkZdBbcASFAVONG1rVLWWF3dnQENsCg-cRusaGHppl56aFXovJ-grdBdNW6FEZxrLRsQS2-sUb0Js9K9Z5pDQMpH851xozss8ZUfcDRzTlV0d6K9MPWPyYHJwU_zJWjWfK2ZHD5zRMK5MDlEfEB97sETXOObV7999QXEba3LmRJS7aMvP_4qqgEDU_-F1KY1WqjqcGF_YoxYTMc0X5PH-L6E_vS-h5O_AQAA__-PE4T1) to discuss the meeting. _" There were many, many points that we agreed on, most of them,"_ Trump said, but cautioned that "_there 's no deal until there's a deal."_
## U.S. Sends Air, Naval Forces to Caribbean
The United States has ordered [air and naval forces](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOtD6B8MVLtLQXdqUyIH1sZGNkb0c4u0j8grpRhppRt_39ZyejgJtr08X0bJP04ZnCciMeeJ8xH0_mLaIyMs8p7jnFKlMEmTXwNAIMy2OwjXperEeUaKq0Yq-65QazKDr1fZO9cZI4YTzwvuu-3aoUM3aKBgcQE32XoNBGAGgtWxR-IcZjHqYZVb64SoNuBCn3P4k2nhFH670xtzOKdbBrsx7qdRHJcdKjud5tpdbU7rbSo43TiVHl5nmgHc8ShMpELt8NQvuIV20vRqf8oylKengFfPWCBA9QAeiXTmGOttlPykEKqavNLyio_D3z_-S9rbyNwAA__8QJYH6) to the southern Caribbean Sea to address the growing threat posed by Latin American drug cartels.

Sources said the deployment included more than 4,000 Marines and sailors, [several P-8 spy planes, at least one warship,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE2O4yAUBk-Dd1j8meAFi9FI3mU20WiWFoZHzDQYC7_Eyu1bafUN-gLfV1X_rvPVpZy2-x9XwGKs8wbnkQER2oztUfb9gWkrABi8r2VvtaRjFkwMlBnK9Rxcyq9ZdcFGAAGyA8svwyCl0UZ1qzXLMhg_Lhc5uCiWUUW5qBgiGK24Hscu2fcaM1xzxpQSPfA4aqPlqIOXanREMQgJa-v_17ThCjG_6hNa72vpsl0R94PIX0RMREznefZfSMWl3PvaPz6ImN5SREyuYfIZKB8YE1xyIqa_Nxpgz_V10Fibh4P-di0tC7iN3sBR7xpCPvoVS-6aDfuZck6HvhDF7t8fpcMfpXta8RkAAP__5KqDqQ) and at least one attack submarine. Officials said the process would continue for several months in international airspace and waters. President Trump has made cracking down on drug cartels a central goal of his effort to secure the U.S. southern border.

name: Troy Downing
subject: I faced Taliban gunfire and lived to tell the tale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I risked my life flying helicopters through war zones in the dead of night to rescue wounded American soldiers from terrorists in Afghanistan. Please read my full story:

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTE5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxNl9HNC1RWS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk3ODAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTZfRzQtUVkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5NzgwLTI4OTkifQ/B-kh76rwOLQuX2RiR0H6Bw)I survived boot camp.
I flew through Afghan airspace.
I faced Taliban gunfire and __lived to tell the tale.__ Peter, as a Combat Search and Rescue aviator in the U.S. Air Force, I risked my life on two tours in Afghanistan.

Time and again, I ventured beyond the wire to rescue wounded soldiers and provide emergency medical evacuations.
The motto that guided me then, **“These things we do, that others may live,”** still drives me today.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTE5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxNl9HNC1RWS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk3ODAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTZfRzQtUVkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5NzgwLTI4OTkifQ/Ins2QdgQmMgAtIftAU2Yag)My name is Troy Downing. I love our troops and our country. That’s why, after leaving the military, I ran for office. And with your help, I won my race for Congress in Montana last year.

**Now, I need your help to stay in this fight. Democrats want to see this America First combat veteran pack his bags and head home.**
But **_YOU_** have the power to stop them.
[If you can chip in just $25 today, I promise we’ll meet every attack head-on and stop their plan to destroy America.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTE5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxNl9HNC1RWS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk3ODAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTZfRzQtUVkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5NzgwLTI4OTkifQ/fsxaxRtuoo-s9YHJLiZ9_w)[RUSH REINFORCEMENTS
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTE5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxNl9HNC1RWS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk3ODAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTZfRzQtUVkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5NzgwLTI4OTkifQ/F5LKgk7xeJsMUd138958Eg)I’ve laid it all on the line once, and I’m ready to do it again. But I can’t do it without you, Peter.

Peter, as a Combat Search and Rescue aviator in the U.S. Air Force, I risked my life on two tours in Afghanistan. Time and again, I ventured beyond the wire to rescue wounded soldiers and provide emergency medical evacuations. The motto that guided me then, “These things we do, that others may live,” still drives me today. name is Troy Downing. I love our troops and our country. body:
Let's talk about Texas redistricting.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa596d25-e91d-4686-a559-103bb9e12239/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae24b517-b8da-4c0d-833d-0dff500977ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I know there's A LOT of news circulating about redistricting in Texas, so let me break it down. A few weeks ago, President Trump demanded the Texas GOP give him five more seats in Congress. Texas Republicans responded by calling a special legislative session under the guise of passing flood relief ... and used that special session instead to blatantly gerrymander our map and give the president what he wants. This is egregious. As a voting rights lawyer for over a decade, it's the most brazen attack on our democracy and attempt to just openly steal congressional seats that I've ever seen. And let's be clear, it isn't just about the maps: The GOP wants to use this to rig elections and then pass more bills that will rip away health care while cutting taxes for the wealthy. They want prices on everyday Americans to go up, while their millionaire and billionaire donors get richer and richer. It's on ALL OF US to fight back. I’m running for Senate to root out corruption in our government and give Texans the representation we deserve – but I need you with me, Peter. Early polls show me ahead, but my GOP opponents have already raised millions of dollars, and I'm counting on your grassroots support to help me close the gap. [Please – will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action of $10 or whatever you can – to help me bring change to Texas?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33a90a13-edb8-49e3-b3a1-39fec367968d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48b4c10b-5904-4012-aca5-9b01ce9a1a87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Waldoboro Republicans to Hold Great American Picnic at Trump Wall on Saturday (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=19dc22d7b8&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Maine Wire Staff on Aug 16, 2025 06:59 am
If you’re in the Midcoast region and you’re looking for some family-friendly fun this Saturday afternoon, you might check out the ‘Great American Picnic’ that Waldoboro Republicans are hosting at the Trump Wall between 11 a.m. and 3 p.m., their Facebook page invites. Located at 979 Washington Road, or Route 220, a few miles north [...]

China’s economy showed signs of weakening in July, with Beijing openly acknowledging that U.S. tariffs are taking a toll, multiple outlets reported Friday. The slowdown is unfolding amid ongoing trade negotiations [...]

## Special Session Adjourns, Abbott Calls Another
The Texas legislature [adjourned](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd1gwGP8UFNu4y7ZbWhjGzkgELEBx8vYrRyluf7tPM9LROd-_23KzFCjuf-0DTX1taYl4loC1Yv7ggY5sKFgKpbhn6ynuZQEBmouRy37xlsJ76RpvVuEn2aCRg9aqA6VEczejUx4FbL1CqdcJ1AS9c6OVYgCnQTdkrjAxyl5KoWFs_SilX0eQ66D1oCXrBHqqKbf1jhVftmzhnZ6YW5ceTTD3Wo_C1B8GM4P5PM82rs5v5_VmMF8jGMxHClTJXRhSRF6qzfzHcU9Pbtc11cqdDaHwgi5Fz78C-NcAz-ip1EyuUtz5FlLyPGMg3BjMahJaKsVgbrLxx0khUOkH1on9YSl8CtffaX4a-B8AAP__BQWTkg) its special session Friday without reaching a quorum as House Democrats remained absent from proceedings. Gov. Greg Abbott immediately called for a [second special session](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb1iAAdOBoYu3dO1oYfObIBGw4K-TvH0VN2_Q7aQ73em778t8cTHFHL7cDSw-tjJnuLcEiFBPucMaXWrQWiw5VOdjDm0WTCjKDOV69i6m5yw7bxfmP3gHlo9KDVIMA-uu1qwbwKI1qEHJVW-aezWO2gyblNsKoov2VcYM15wzJUzvDed-MYIvo1Kj4kQy8BFL7fEKCA_XtvQsB9R-Lbcu2Svi3sjwScRExBTK0Z-hPpSDiOnFQMS0l4Z_LtRcKnXLUhCpy7n85BUafYPSNykVXbV-v8eUYtMjkSzcXEznJP7vqMOK3wAAAP__viR-5w), with congressional redistricting and flood relief still the focus. “Delinquent House Democrats ran away from their responsibility,” Abbott said._“We will not back down from this fight. That’s why I am calling them back today to finish the job.”_ House Democrats have now committed to return to Texas in response to both Friday’s adjournment and to a counter-redistricting measure activated by the California legislature.
## TEA Releases 2025 Grades for Schools
The Texas Education Agency (TEA) released its 2025 A-F accountability ratings Friday, covering the last two school years, showing 24% of districts and 31% of schools [improving their grades](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAQhU-DO1sMP4YtKLZxl223tMAMNhIxEaA4uf2KXGG7r5j5Zt77va03G1M89x97R9NeIa8nXjVha1g--MAt2lSx1pjPvVgfz72ujDI5Uj3CvHob03sVgzeO-i8Y0ICSkgvGOR0OwwN3VkIAK_UsAFGFTYUAnKJzVMshmi6jGmYAKpmevAbwTjNwSkolgQiKPrZcpnZgw5etIb3zE8u05fuQzNHaoxL-TdhC2HJd1xTyS_Tf-wBhS0fCls_qWLcj5zQW23qQsd8eivGPK6YU66yIoPvdxvSRt_9V8jTsLwAA___cWnX_) year-over-year. The report comes just a few months after the group released the 2023 ratings, which were delayed due to 19 months of court proceedings. TEA’s ratings determine whether a school district is subject to state intervention, as happened to Houston ISD in 2023. You can see ratings for [all districts here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULGuozAQ_BrojGyDjVO4uIbuXXslWuOFrGRwhDfk5e9PcLr8wOt2ZlajmfnzNX4BJdqW37Ci5-85jxu-SkJm3K_zgRNBKlgK5W3ZIdK2lFFLbYR0QtkxAqX32NXRBxlvqkavemPaTretrO8-WjQwSxuiU0YHeXM31HOI1lk7TQZq8qeZdMoqJY12TXRKxeC0Cr0xvVFVJzES573hOzJ-Q5nTOx-4N1Ne6-TvzI9Stb8qPVR6YITmemqWfFR6gJCfLBih0sPZR8AWxfpMTCtG-rA7JoSC5T8-M_1z-0gXJ0DMAqYpPzeGQIn4LXbgc5RT7z5gyy8BqWQBB1CCkLDefXy8KCUqtq86uaxA6erAP1v-8PpvAAAA__801pop).
## Heavy Rain Hits South Texas
A tropical rain system made land Friday in South Texas, raising flash flood and high wind risks in the region and causing Gov. Greg Abbott to [activate emergency teams](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_O4yAQxJ8Gd0SwNn9SUFzj7rv2SgvYtY2OmAhI_OXtT4l0T_BVu9JofpqZP1_Ll085HdtvfyPXv9eyHHS2TL1T_bx3isnnRq2lcmzVYzq2toAAxYXlUi_oU34t04AuCLzKgZw0So0TjKMYdrdqZaMJKoTrGtB4rcWoAyFJ8tMUpyG5N0xYqaUUCuwFrZQYLMhglDJKskkQpl7qpe_U6du3Nb_Kk-olltuQ3d77vbHxF4OZwXye5-XvXh5vkcHsa08xE4P5XYbBnEv0mcH8Af2_vNGTKvGTfN-p8u2RVx6Lb53TjepGR3zxSq08aqS3C6ziEtGqqIHT1ROfzNXwgFJwDMpKlAIB7FAd3s-Uc2rasElsN5_yJ3f_2dpPB_8CAAD__8tCk8Q) preemptively. The system had a 50% chance of developing into a tropical depression but failed to reach that status before tracking inland. The heaviest rain ranged from the lower Rio Grande Valley to near San Antonio and parts of the Texas Hill Country. The system is expected to fully dissipate today and into Sunday morning. Meanwhile, a [heat advisory](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdEYegwMULrahy7ZbImMPMFrzI3sSkre_gle43WiOzqdP599zeDqKtM1_3YqWP9M-bHjmiMyY7vNATy5mzJn2bU4u0DbnQSttpGolPIbgKH6Hugh2VKGDAi00xlS1ripVLNb7SjUwdThV2nfgwY_12E2TqYMyTdcVZC-YauEBoIxuy9AChLHVMDbGNAZErTAQ76nkBRk_Lk_xu78xlX5fi2gX5iOL6o_QvdD9eZ6lH_OlfuVC93dF6P56Cd0v6FjSFvAjOdERUQaaieWEGLOM9B8l43pgcvxKmOW2J17kDZHuNb8ySzBC90Wy4TgpRsqPRtRqXh3FW4l_N-Tb6p8AAAD__0ChikE) began at noon yesterday in North Texas and is expected to extend to 8 p.m. tonight.

Gov. Greg Abbott immediately called for a , with congressional redistricting and flood relief still the focus. “Delinquent House Democrats ran away from their responsibility,” Abbott said.“We will not back down from this fight. That’s why I am calling them back today to finish the job.” House Democrats have now committed to return to Texas in response to both Friday’s adjournment and to a counter-redistricting measure activated by the California legislature. TEA Releases 2025 Grades for Schools The Texas Education Agency (TEA) released its 2025 A-F accountability ratings Friday, covering the last two school years, showing 24% of districts and 31% of schools year-over-year. The report comes just a few months after the group released the 2023 ratings, which were delayed due to 19 months of court proceedings. TEA’s ratings determine whether a school district is subject to state intervention, as happened to Houston ISD in 2023. You can see ratings for . Heavy Rain Hits South Texas A tropical rain system made land Friday in South Texas, raising flash flood and high wind risks in the region and causing Gov. Greg Abbott to preemptively. The system had a 50% chance of developing into a tropical depression but failed to reach that status before tracking inland. The heaviest rain ranged from the lower Rio Grande Valley to near San Antonio and parts of the Texas Hill Country. The system is expected to fully dissipate today and into Sunday morning. name: Team DLCC
subject: Republicans are out of touch
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
While working families struggle to afford groceries, the Trump administration runs wild. The GOP will not lower costs or expand economic opportunity – their only interest is in themselves. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Amid the chaos of our political climate, one thing remains crystal clear: **Republicans are out of touch with the American people.** |
* J.D. Vance ordered the Army Corps of Engineers to raise water levels in Ohio to create “ideal kayaking conditions” for his birthday trip.
* Trump announced the construction of a new $200 million ballroom at the White House.
* NASA Administrator Sean Duffy announced plans to build a nuclear reactor on the moon that would cost $3 billion over five years.
* **Republicans voted in lockstep with Trump to pass his Billionaires-First Bill and kick millions of people off of Medicaid.**

---
While working families struggle to afford groceries, the Trump administration is spending our tax dollars on elaborate birthday parties, absurd construction projects, and frivolous lawsuits – _it’s pathetic._
[The most important work to improve people’s lives is happening in our statehouses – and the DLCC needs your urgent support to elect more Democrats who will build an economy that works for everyone. Donate $7 today → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdglo_f8yZE_4oHr2BPjl8c_1grFt_SawCe0gWqzlWcWKLQdLZAp_qwXL_DcrKymrx9SXO9MFt62-ptw1MtSY6DHhkYy2h664Lx9kqoII5AkYQgPonCn5_ILmNEoBmq85Fvia8F_lg4W9wDX1rVlGnnm-0It4Zn5_XW6uKT0QWizdrTN6ZBW_2HjW_yjFDuTGBEYz9yMG8Wapg8DuitH6eLq4DUzJ4EhReV3KTr8ihcwZcCiO2O0FgSCtmxt_Xw4tDvgED7moDQDR-1kd5wYG5JAt6V-fSdnySfMfI6ItkhaBMffwI1r5dbwmx7s3rl7W3_GiwUWN_Di_Tari-VtCPN0QGXzS6V6pRKlxygbWE0T1fnfaeKWd8Ruqw9DClQOsxj6r9coDKKHeI5UtpwVZ9zLvEQaw0AJ0qVPDKSwrUGRfhgRAHj5A5gaxSxToJYyzDpHhyBkpN1qbOhyvhJYoHz9cH4cQ34GaReD734YpJXH_OwjoMllI_GxKFziWwK-wIIXo3O6hpcfdRsDGureKaVXaJXb_nD9QPYjIY8I-W8p7/4j3/N0aw_ztFTEKHap_hNNzkag/h0/h001.qY03eKFztzCzivjklrT7ygHtbUZJjEEs-dZokBt35AE)

State Democrats understand the needs of their constituents and work hard to meet them – we need their leadership in communities like yours.

clean_body: While working families struggle to afford groceries, the Trump administration runs wild. The GOP will not lower costs or expand economic opportunity – their only interest is in themselves. | | | | | ---|--- Amid the chaos of our political climate, one thing remains crystal clear: Republicans are out of touch with the American people. | J.D. Vance ordered the Army Corps of Engineers to raise water levels in Ohio to create “ideal kayaking conditions” for his birthday trip. Trump announced the construction of a new $200 million ballroom at the White House. NASA Administrator Sean Duffy announced plans to build a nuclear reactor on the moon that would cost $3 billion over five years. Republicans voted in lockstep with Trump to pass his Billionaires-First Bill and kick millions of people off of Medicaid. While working families struggle to afford groceries, the Trump administration is spending our tax dollars on elaborate birthday parties, absurd construction projects, and frivolous lawsuits – it’s pathetic. State Democrats are committed to putting money back in Americans’ pockets, passing legislation to raise the minimum wage in states like Delaware, Michigan, and New York, and eliminating the grocery tax in Illinois. State Democrats understand the needs of their constituents and work hard to meet them – we need their leadership in communities like yours. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: School Choice is Coming to Mississippi!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/committedtoschoolchoice?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **What would it take for Mississippi to embrace School Choice?** How can we join our neighboring states in empowering families to control their child's share of the education budget?

For School Choice to happen, we would need to see several steps.

**Number one, we would need a committed Governor, ready to invest his political capital in this great conservative cause.** Great news! This week, Governor Tate Reeves signaled in an interview with SuperTalk that School Choice will be his top priority for the 2026 legislative session.
---
|
---
_Speaker Jason White supports School Choice!_
| **Step two, we would have to have a supportive House Speaker**. Once again, good news. This week, Speaker Jason White confirmed that the House is actively crafting legislation for 2026.

**Thirdly, we would have to have strong grassroots support**. Polling already shows that more than two-thirds of Mississippians support School Choice.

**This week,_Americans for Prosperity – Mississippi_ hosted an outstanding event in Jackson, led by the amazing Starla Brown.** Speakers like Pastor Greg Divinity and Leah Ferretti powerfully articulated the moral imperative: Every family should have the choices that today are reserved only for the wealthy.
---
|
---
_Pastor Divinity supports School Choice_
| **Fourth, it would be a big help to have the endorsement of Team Trump**. Fantastic news on that front, too—having discussed this at the White House some time ago, it's evident to me that Team Trump is not just supportive; they're deeply passionate, viewing School Choice as "the civil rights issue of our time."
---
|
---
_The White House wants School Choice!_
| **Fifth, if we are to allow families control of their child’s share of the budget, it would be helpful to know what “their share” consists of.** Thanks to the 2024 school funding reforms, every child now receives a base amount of about $7,000 annually.

All we ask is that those who want to have that money paid into an Education Savings Account that they can then allocate to a school of their choice.

**Finally, it would be tremendously helpful if those against School Choice endlessly resorted to misleading claims and hyperbole. I don’t think we’ll be disappointed there, either. **

Claims that school choice would force your local school board to accept students from outside areas are simply untrue—and I believe many of those that suggest otherwise know it. **Every proposal I’ve seen ensures school boards retain the final say on capacity.**

As I learned from the Brexit campaign, dishonest claims from opponents only undermines the credibility of their campaigns. Having been able to rely on establishment opinion for too long, they’ve never mastered the art of making their case convincingly.

**All the ingredients are there for Mississippi to adopt School Choice in 2026.**

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ec714ab886&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=78a40bb0d1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=78a40bb0d1).

Look at the evidence: First: Republicans won this seat by two points in 2021 in a devastating blow to Democrats. Then: Polls came out showing Abigail Spanberger in the driver's seat to flip Virginia blue. Now: Trump started attacking Abigail and floated an endorsement of our opponent. If winning this election and defeating Trump's agenda is important to you, now is when Abigail Spanberger needs your support. = = = = = = = Thanks for stepping up, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Briana Sewell
subject: Public Schools are Our Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
Dear ,

For those attending Prince William County Public Schools, school is back in session on Monday. I couldn’t be more excited for our students to start the new school year, and I’m sure there are a lot of parents who are excited too. As a product of our local public schools, I understand the vital role our education system plays in setting our students up for success. I am also well aware that while our teachers and support staff are doing their absolute best, our schools are still capable of being even better.

During my time in the General Assembly, I have been proud to vote for increases to teacher pay , increased funding for public schools, cutting red tape to get our teachers in the classroom faster, and so much more. My work on the Education Committee in the House of Delegates has yielded real results, but I’m only getting started.

Prince William students deserve the best, and I believe a Democratic majority will deliver them the best

Our education system can be the best in the nation with the right investment, support, and community buy-in. Abigail Spanberger’s education platform is the right plan for the right time to help protect and improve Virginia schools, despite constant attacks from Republicans in DC. We can make a vision of giving every child the highest quality education in America a reality, but only if we have the right leadership in Richmond.

Can you donate $25 today to help us win big in November?

DONATE TODAY [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/friendsofbriana-main]

I’ll never stop fighting for our schools, and I know Democrats in Virginia are with me. We have the right values, the right policies, and the right people for the job. We cannot wait; Virginia’s children need us.

Yours in service,
Briana Sewell

Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDPKPY_4S0izjMklQV7G1w2?unsubscribedata=1c4uBsIB9aQUHKNBPiRZmj%2BXgUcHD4z2MdZpW8862KsD%2BMRu4DN0iLVLg2%2FZGUA0oCOj8l%2Fhq0zgHf3kw7SIjZuYn1UjdkNCWtISBQsf41izlaUcsadPQYb4h9WViBPpU2J62IFYJRtR3XXqnNx9vBoxMmfrPl1d8RVkowW30vXliu2exl8RWT5WStG8e1H02wnXOKdeV%2BnwshGAZBesK8rJSm5vjgJxQR4a9N9z2OYkXNbWWUaO2VR%2FkNkfQK2SykaaUE9twnBWqrXLSEovICOMiED0bxD5DxChiO89c7GD%2BzJpZlKwoiE440QHdnnszJ7CyzcdZVLR4pqnPf42ur549816iW3LIqelDp7aHOhqjh%2BxO9MLP2nRVJw9DyTgG145jCiQDGZheV6zL5oW3lW8wGpiOGP6oo8cvts7fwgMK1rBx9UOgooXjUVLYZDh .

name: kmr
subject: Quick update
body:
Glad I caught you, friend.
I wanted to take a moment to update you on our mid-quarter fundraising push.
As of this morning, we’re still $3,943 short of our goal. Will you chip in $3 now? The race for MI-08 is a must-hold for a Democratic House majority, and we can’t leave anything to chance.
**Here’s a good link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113421014/563717684/1362877131?refcode=em-8.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNiOWRlOS1hMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTMwmFDYsggzDG4m77jCxCVpNV0Am4ErVl3iCWvevTc=)**
Look, I know that emails like this can start to blur together – especially when your inbox is full. But this one’s important. The GOP is already spending _big_ to flip this Trump-won seat, and we’re up against a flood of outside money and misinformation.
Every dollar we raise this weekend helps us organize, respond, and stay ahead. Your support – especially early on – makes a real difference.
So friend, if you can, please send in a donation before tonight's mid-quarter deadline. Any amount helps, but $3 from you would go a long way.
**Here’s that link again:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113421020/563717710/1362877131?refcode=em-8.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNiOWRlOS1hMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTMwmFDYsggzDG4m77jCxCVpNV0Am4ErVl3iCWvevTc=)**
Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your weekend!
Kristen

Kristen for Michigan
P.O. Box 854
Bay City, MI 48707
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/wIbGWuvzGU-Lj2kxieOm2g2?unsubscribedata=Fw1BQYQ0dOwb1lH0eA5dv0aYtaFOmOkOGoW%2BjXM4zh90enCsDCeJ3rwZSkFYsHWhqyfUVhWmF0%2Bl44MhjsnQJ5GS0unDbe1njKqVuLFHOr2WSiG0%2FqYNabGNBnOw%2Fg1Srb%2F4pEq2tUZ%2F9n6t79unpHs4TwnNtNm9Jnqz47ATZSjStY5xbUzhVQdeI8WlRmsguF07h0VIfKl7cIoKjtxVmoQq%2FLNzQgDIo9vdEzy3YieTF%2FyeW6MYWmTSgB5ni%2FXONyA39ldjxiLA6YAfsBCz0BNf0nOTBMwDd8tYA3lywbIpFbA1ufjBQyTdvMl9DdhzieCLBw0%2Bl2n8ZTZqG6EdZ0I3sg7QsoIaMA3SpM1%2B4yK%2FDZDETYRoJO5Xk1SluAC%2FgzvQsM9%2BMAOpzTeKG8Uf%2FMpPWqloWlHUhK%2FqZ9PXtIAx%2FTdiI%2BGImEG6nRQJuLUA).

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Help me take back our libraries
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift to our “See You at the Library Day” happening on August 16th?
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206w1ysebhq7gsdgy8cgytr6iuk7g1t1tzm2a7wv6rqfacagwi07awe5zmaci8i9z8cvkgy3zcpgnlqqqxm&__stmp=t1385o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift to our "See You at the Library Day" happening on August 16th?](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h)** If you haven't heard about the "See You at the Library Day" on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it's so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist." They've stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder's name from a prestigious book award because of her "problematic" _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for "Drag Queen Story Hours" where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for "families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for..."
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h)
---
| Woke Baby. "For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world."
---

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros' Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you've noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating "the environment" to a type of religion. The "Teen Zone" is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here's what's really alarming. We can't just sit back and say, "Well, I'll just make sure my family doesn't go to "Drag Queen Story Hour" and we won't check out those inappropriate books." That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! [**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980's family sitcom "Growing Pains" or from my work in inspirational movies like "Fireproof" and "Left Behind." I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what's far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote "As You Grow" to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn't like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that's original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to "confuse and demoralize children," our supporters were described as "bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about," and on and on. I can't even print most things these radicals said because it's so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang "God Bless America," and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here's the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that's how our nationwide "See You at the Library Day" was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. **I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...** ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left's radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America's libraries. _And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand "See You at the Library Day" to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children._ That day is August 16th, 2025. And what we need is you! It's going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That's why I hope you'll give a sponsorship gift of $125, $250, $375 or more today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a "Story Hour Kit" to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who's organizing a "See You at the Library Day" event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don't have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who've taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, [**please consider a sponsorship gift of $125.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h) That's enough to sponsor one entire "Story Hour Kit" yourself. Singlehandedly, you'll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it's $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the "See You at the Library Day" on August 16th.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1385o&__onlt=h)**
---

He calls this **his “legacy project.”**

**Let’s be clear. This is his true legacy:** Trump has worked to cripple our economy, slash funding for food assistance, cut Medicaid, chip away at our democracy, and more.

At every turn, Trump’s policies are making life more expensive for hardworking Americans – from cars to coffee to clothes. Meanwhile, he is forcing us to pay the bill for massive tax cuts for billionaires while undertaking vanity projects at the White House. Whatever happened to waste, fraud, and abuse?

**It’s disgusting.**

[**Republicans are consistently putting themselves and the wealthy donors over everyday Americans, and we are not going to stand for it. Join me in fighting back by taking back the House by chipping in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113421641/563719465/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250816Fwd_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NiOWRlOS1hMDdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uNuXbzjEzTp9MYpvk2R2DoRekLULFcXorFx4H1oK4Ac=)

clean_body: It’s disgusting. = Peter – did you hear the news? Recently, as reported by the Washington Post, Trump stood on the roof of the White House and stated that he was “taking a little walk” to look for more ways to “spend my money for the country.” He was referring to a $200 million ballroom that he wishes to build, turning the White House into Mar-a-Lago to pander to the elite. He calls this his “legacy project.” Let’s be clear. This is his true legacy: Trump has worked to cripple our economy, slash funding for food assistance, cut Medicaid, chip away at our democracy, and more. At every turn, Trump’s policies are making life more expensive for hardworking Americans – from cars to coffee to clothes. Meanwhile, he is forcing us to pay the bill for massive tax cuts for billionaires while undertaking vanity projects at the White House. Whatever happened to waste, fraud, and abuse? It’s disgusting. = Thank you, Shontel Brown \----------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, Trump has announced plans to build a $200 million , 90,000-square-foot ballroom in the White House, to be completed “long before” the end of his term. Who’s footing the bill? That remains to be seen... 👀 While Trump is trying to find an easy $1 billion to renovate his “free” jet from Qatar and squander $200 mil on his ballroom, his administration is stripping away access to health care, slashing jobs, taking away food assistance, and more. If it wasn’t clear before, it should be now: Republicans have a billionaire-first agenda that leaves our communities in the dust. The Trump administration and its MAGA cronies in the House are more concerned with granting massive tax handouts to the megawealthy and making sure that Trump doesn’t have to live in the squalor that is the White House than they are with taking care of our families, our communities, and our children. What’s next? name: Derek Dooley
subject: Your film is your resume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dooley for Georiga
body:
Georgia’s ready for a new starter.

---
| | | | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjB/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend,

In football, we have a saying: **“Your film is your resume.”**

When a player told me he deserved more playing time, I’d say, _“Alright, let’s roll the tape.”_

Well, professional politician Jon Ossoff wants another **six years in the U.S. Senate.**

So let’s roll the tape on his record:

❌Open borders
❌Higher taxes
❌Wants to impeach President Trump
❌Supports woke politics in our schools
❌Votes against aid to Israel

**If this were game day, Ossoff wouldn’t make it on the field.**

Georgia deserves a leader who’s going to fight for our Georgia values and deliver real wins for this state.
**[Will you rush $26 or more today to help me put Ossoff to the sidelines for good?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjB/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** | [CHIP IN TO HELP DEFEAT JON OSSOFF](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjB/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

For nearly 30 years, I’ve coached young people to work hard, lead with character, and chase the American Dream. And now, I’m taking on a new challenge.

_It’s the Washington swamp.

It’s professional politicians like Jon Ossoff.

It’s a system that’s forgotten who it’s supposed to serve._

**[So I’m humbly asking you today: Will you consider sending a grassroots donation to help my campaign hit the ground running and FIRE Jon Ossoff on Election Day?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjB/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
[RUSH A DONATION NOW ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjB/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

_Let’s bring home a win for Georgia, bring common sense to D.C., and restore the American Dream for the next generation._

— Derek Dooley for U.S. Senate

* * *

**JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjC/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

**Derek Dooley is running for U.S. Senate because we need a Georgia First fighter.**

_Someone who is not afraid to stand up to the Washington elites and put the future of hardworking families**FIRST.**_

He’s not a politician. He’s a coach, husband, dad, and a conservative outsider who spent nearly 30 years on the football field helping young people chase the American Dream.

**[Now, he’s ready to take that same fight to Washington and protect the future of every hardworking American.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjC/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

While professional politician Jon Ossoff rubber-stamps the Left’s radical agenda...

**Derek is stepping up to defend Georgia values, restore common sense, and bring real leadership to the U.S. Senate.**

_But this will be one of the toughest races in the country and he can’t do it without you by his side._

**[Will you step up and show your support with a donation of any amount today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aZjC/?__vbtrk=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExMjcyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

— Team Dooley

TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_I am THRILLED about your redistricting plan to CRUSH the MAGA House majority and end Trump’s presidency as we know it!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN in 2026 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93101?t=9&akid=20955%2E878179%2EkqntjX) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93101?t=10&akid=20955%2E878179%2EkqntjX)

name: Team Ossoff
subject: The facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, here are the facts of this race:
FACT: Jon Ossoff is the GOP’s #1 target in 2026 and they’ll stop at nothing to defeat him. Far-right groups are spending _millions of dollars_ attacking Jon on the airwaves — and they’re only getting started.
FACT: MAGA extremists are lining up to challenge Jon and are promising to rubber stamp Donald Trump’s agenda if elected.
FACT: Elections in Georgia are decided by razor thin margins — in 2021, Jon won by only 1% of the vote, and in 2024, Donald Trump won by just 2%. We know this election is going to be just as close.
**FACT: It’s going to take all of us to reelect Jon and fight back against the tens of millions of dollars the GOP’s attempts to flip this seat red.**
**[Peter, please donate today to help us respond to right-wing attacks and defend this critical seat. We cannot win this race without supporters stepping up and showing their support.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250816-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=640%2E5691347%2Eg8lp_T)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250816-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=640%2E5691347%2Eg8lp_T)**
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
\- Team Ossoff

name: Team Hilton

| | Peter, You've been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But here's the truth: **this is the moment we need our people the most** --when no one's watching. When the media is tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we're hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I'd be lying if I said I wasn't thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Peter. I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Fellow American!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Fellow American**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | I wrote this for you specifically , Fellow American! Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Fellow American! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a MILLION dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money. Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! Thank you again and may God bless you and your family, Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Governor of Virginia | | | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! Fellow Republican, Do you believe biological males should compete in women’s sports?
**Neither do I. Neither does your Indiana Republican Party.**

And now, we’re taking action.

**Governor Mike Braun is taking real action to protect the integrity of women’s sports.** He signed two executive orders to ensure that _only biological women compete in women’s divisions_ — and to ground Indiana law in biological truth, not radical gender ideology.

**President Trump is fighting on the federal level, too** — restoring Title IX’s true meaning and pushing back against woke institutions like the NCAA.
---
[ **SIGN THE 'RESTORE HER TITLE' PLEDGE** ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/mtMApuMjTX0Rswqx__Ac1X5YhOavAGncvmTLDoGbECWHvRwvwPylYZhx4Jek7_dtntpUIiDYHLF0lWrGGf-eISpkt9hNDNwcd1YVNTFyEsx0ojH4EyWGTPpNEfyc2GYcMvRm38XbdEk-2lXVNGOkDdO2Sc_m0EelrCzi9mXHho0WuaFWMf0jectTlBDYoU5P0q5p5znWPpk0U_Vk_JQSBJz5Rh7yrIrEdzrEI5PoGx3hRYbQbweKrWgBeZv9hFEcUJOzDcqenVQpcwln9IzEqqweB2vH_HXe2jOpDUsdqeN4F3bBe1hRK9RBw14pVGK4tBxnoeLruCbz42KA39pIFYbh-e_LnehpVcNFs7ibmXFgjeyVRhLR8jJ5KwoMq28Z54JbxfnBhOHj9UT8f8uq4VeNcwdtK4YC-Wnwy98A0yscmNyvMZdDh3pjSvCXE8A-5sZ2up6s9r2Aw_zRa52hDa3496GzrHv5ep35HM4ydK89KlIia-ybqHYGNzQksUyc7T17fMo26M9reYSLQAt36VNzPPa91Ue_7pKGf6yLCFOgxB7n55vvm899Hzo029xczMkEemybgnT_FOXHuc7hCt_i8v8r_KZyX8tim3O3Dg/_PNxtqAE-UJRcTw4WxnkSTKFERPU_nZw/11)
---
Attorney General Todd Rokita and his Republican colleagues from across the nation are [_**demanding that the NCAA do the right thing and restore the titles of women athletes**_](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/N2CWk9-iiV9hdQZSEnMUrl8hQefwIEqFK2N7A799JDzN3SrjyA2voPiJqKZAbunFR56Sz8Ux46r7mjLAp3ZTeFzdT5L8aGqClTmiPowiLHYjdL2hudQpLMBUWrkOz41iBqmHnkhEnHfp39YVd0iF0ziVmLG0RSiU7vRjsNLkk5s3711_8aW8C2Qb_v7uGyS5VOpLpXd2T7VpcMa8HEl6JOk1ux8To7D_P5plTkxirm-AZZ_g2Y2-JVLsYHbwdXctsxyycPW2lEBQCR7l81cnuBAsTtIgeZtJ9g-Lj3qBfmKVDMMRRDS87HZrYUNqeZSq6tLpysQuvWwXy0OjJ8guTyeV8yb2KYBjxuNSolW9ZFMwP24lrfbIPL9WcxkUaxbRrayJ5KcjeGjpT5YGAWTEOp7t2Zams7IQ8KH65Q7HPOenhU9pfX7Km04SCELwfVw-WY5wF1CmsKe5u_Ht52q1iLVMcM5G2fEizXAu-Cmpyz1u9s2es7PMESDbR5d8ym3bhYn6s286AB5etNMEDfxzWMyzm6qxbDjt0tGdLoyTKWz_Lfz0V27ksjbCNnwpxTEOU4IGs-bCE5xocAevJS7EkHjLtztZNypckMIi6kP1ag/cEeFODjvTK_JvLkMk1YBRCnm1aSWROU3/11) forced to compete against biological men.
But the Left is on the attack to stop this effort. They’ll do everything in their power to shut it down.

That’s why we need you to join the fight.

**📝 _[Add your name to the “Restore Her Title” pledge and show your support »](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/n210MyWHnc-IKlL_7yGBlrwrBozrgXcr0GDAYs--TUGhTbSnxCWZ--09_5sUw8CQgxVsTteMcyx5JKUXSO6Tqzb3mzqD4256iD6h7GOfPVezZb8545Xb1PQ2uSz7Ayfq-bAKQY6KuiO8kSjuPZtza-V_0bg3ysiAMNxS9qPSVqMRvca4s2okqRMj2YjrE2C4bT2cRMvINb6gD9jNAaz5nyH3G9JN2j_6J2woS99Itc973rXt0AFlDLRFu2CPM1dLG9eHSbB3TqDyXzNro8-dZ8kSX9K-tZnW2V5bRzwB83KD7kQhMcwc1RQH3Zw5Xyl5QKbZcXhFRW_o58oOZFKvDTXZpIs9E3dCUhzMGtZgictRuXxpZBw3h5YNWFlj75RKdVeDY2m-VuykwrfVDGO-ADWI-OIqy20McMOWTazMb0RBJNJf29Sugm-eAERIp5O3NbyNYTK9ttAE8mp1zWNFNQShVxPOGLLsij3oho8LVUTk5LHLropP5T03B14DlvQuXveB-N2AKlzpVEPNlmb1ziXv6iDEzALnSSeCBCGiX55F6NZ_TMSDaiosA9wPeSfo9k1ku29i2Mi2yWfcHSTz5QqBcGJvFthIeO8toraR_Q/NGzDhpUQFXL7fjNS2xvj6zoacg9awhgL/11)_**

When thousands of voices rise together, we can’t be ignored. Let’s send a message to the NCAA and every radical activist trying to erase biological truth:

**Indiana fights for women.**
**Indiana fights for fairness.**

Fellow Conservative,

You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most.

But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you.

I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over.

Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash.

And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative.

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you. I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over. Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative. So here’s what I’m asking: Not for the number—honestly, it’s symbolic. Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you’re still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that you haven’t tuned out. We can’t win this with half our team watching from the sidelines. And the truth is: I’m asking you to come back. Even just a little. Especially now. For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: VoteVets
subject: Tough news from VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It’s a tough time, it’s the end of summer, and it’s just hard to stay locked in with everything because of how crazy the news is every single day. We get it.
#
Peter — we hate when this happens.
We fell short of our mid-quarter fundraising goals yesterday.
To be clear, this is not your fault. You’ve already done more than most people to support this organization and our Veterans.
It’s a tough time, it’s the end of summer, and it’s hard to stay locked in with everything because of how crazy the news is every single day. We get it.
Even still, it’s not great timing for us. We’re finalizing media plans and strategy through November this year to maximize our gains and push as hard as we possibly can. There are important elections this year, and we have to win them.
Falling short is a bad sign, and it impacts how much we’ll be able to do this fall. So, here’s the deal:
You’ve been with us for a while, and we’re hoping we might be willing to join the rest of the people who power VoteVets.
Do you think you can do it?
**[Please — make a contribution and help get us back on track. We’re planning on punching back, and hard. But we can’t without your help.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250816-1-60&t=1&akid=34533%2E3013755%2E71WM32)

Fellow activist, If you haven’t seen it already, there have been massive funding cuts to media and public broadcasting, as part of a $9 billion rescissions package requested by Trump.

Why? Trump and the GOP argue that public media is unfair to conservatives and a waste of taxpayer money, according to _NPR_.

Reading between the lines: **Trump doesn’t like hearing stories and facts from independent news sources that make him look bad, so he defunded them.** That’s a clear overreach of power, and we will not stand for it.

**Earlier this year, the New Pennsylvania Project launched “Slingshot The Podcast.” And with the recent defunding of pubic news, funding this podcast is more crucial now than ever, especially in our efforts to engage voters ahead of the 2025 elections. **

In each episode, NPP’s CEO Kadida Kenner brings her background as a civil rights advocate, offering fresh perspectives on civic engagement, justice, and power. Slingshot is where bold conversations meet culture, politics, sports, and real-world issues. Slingshot The Podcast amplifies the voices too often overlooked or misrepresented—voices that move the culture forward. Whether we’re talking policy or pop culture, this is unfiltered truth from the ground up.

The _6abc_ data team found more than 16 million Black men were eligible to vote in the 2022 midterm election, **but only 38.6% cast a ballot. **

**This podcast intentionally centers the Black community and engages Black men specifically in the democratic process through culture, sports, and real-world issues.** We’ve hit double digits! **[Episode 10](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Ys66jsafPitr-2BGSvtoOZR0bJf5Bx-2B9zlzsQ675RTtAIwrb1NJ3XQ92ZKE30ERb4QaJmGE8-2BJfZvfDf4EITuvJmU-3Dr1Zb_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYOaf-2BW-2Fid4tN5NVmg2HO-2FdS00BiJ9HuQxCKaj7hBbaHnwb2936PO7QkIgAXy9KjQJX6v-2FH5na5QAiru-2BlGTFicZ0NZND2KGUgUtkemErNq8si9sVJx-2B2hWdWonhQ13Xt7dCQkgf9eGqclYT0occt7UpNiuAJtgpodVuMKwfnCxmxw-2B5g1xl-2BfV33LjkqjsN9E)** is here, and we’re celebrating this milestone with a powerful conversation on the role music, community, and leadership play in driving real change. | | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, If you haven’t seen it already, there have been massive funding cuts to media and public broadcasting, as part of a $9 billion rescissions package requested by Trump. Why? Trump and the GOP argue that public media is unfair to conservatives and a waste of taxpayer money, according to NPR. Reading between the lines: Trump doesn’t like hearing stories and facts from independent news sources that make him look bad, so he defunded them. That’s a clear overreach of power, and we will not stand for it. Earlier this year, the New Pennsylvania Project launched “Slingshot The Podcast.” And with the recent defunding of pubic news, funding this podcast is more crucial now than ever, especially in our efforts to engage voters ahead of the 2025 elections. In each episode, NPP’s CEO Kadida Kenner brings her background as a civil rights advocate, offering fresh perspectives on civic engagement, justice, and power. Slingshot is where bold conversations meet culture, politics, sports, and real-world issues. Slingshot The Podcast amplifies the voices too often overlooked or misrepresented—voices that move the culture forward. Whether we’re talking policy or pop culture, this is unfiltered truth from the ground up. The 6abc data team found more than 16 million Black men were eligible to vote in the 2022 midterm election, but only 38.6% cast a ballot. This podcast intentionally centers the Black community and engages Black men specifically in the democratic process through culture, sports, and real-world issues. We’ve hit double digits! is here, and we’re celebrating this milestone with a powerful conversation on the role music, community, and leadership play in driving real change. Watch it at , or listen wherever you get your podcasts (Spotify, Apple, etc.) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support. Your contribution is a crucial part of our fight against attacks on public media by the Trump Administration. If you want to listen to the latest episode, Last Night A DJ Saved My Life, you can . Otherwise, click here to view all of the episodes of Onward, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. name: Indiana GOP
subject: Back to School

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Back to School**_
---
Friends, As Hoosier students and parents prepare for the new school year, Indiana Republicans have a lot to celebrate. This week, Governor Braun underscored his commitment to protecting our schools by appointing a proven leader to head Indiana’s new Office of School Safety. Secretary Julie Q. Smith has dedicated her career to keeping students safe, and her appointment is an important milestone in Governor Braun's public safety agenda and a major step forward in ensuring that every Hoosier student can learn in an environment where safety is never in question. Indiana also enters the new school year celebrating historic progress in literacy, with the latest statewide reading assessment showing the largest gains in our history. These results are proof that when parents, educators, and communities work together with a clear focus on fundamentals, students succeed. From safeguarding our schools to equipping students with the skills they need for lifelong success, our Republican leadership is delivering on their promise to make Indiana the best place in America to learn, grow, and achieve. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| | _**Governor Braun Announces Indiana's First Director of the Office of School Safety**_
---
---
On Monday, Governor Braun reaffirmed his commitment to the safety of Hoosier students by announcing that Julie Q. Smith will be Indiana's first Director of the newly formed Office of School Safety. Sergeant Julie Q. Smith is a national instructor for the National Association of School Resource Officers and president of the Indiana School Resource Officers Administration. She recently retired from the Columbus Police Department, where she led the School Resource Officer Division. "As a national leader in school safety, Julie is uniquely qualified for this role and I have complete faith in her leadership of this important office." \- Governor Braun via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/bjsrZurkSIDZI_Go53YJbl-XSt5BsZQ00n7yKKSKz6ns3YJqFyg3vNylxvGi3kngrIJYq7A7xVqlW_Uzpx_Aa3jyci2tSFB3VG4R5B0cFO0yyNy_dKjYP_pd_jtUqmiMwGvOPwW6zw_xXbRXoPGoCqy6MxrNEWKIxYHJKOeiOLEIeEbivxu7iZjj4hHwfURBaYGgml40QJVZXlOFdayV1OIzj5Yr0wv_FCWZ5LE3C6ku5iWumjJYosAiqzwS1SOJuf9OBLpXpabYAnDLhP2ZzOjQ55hMTDxD4qt9uKJIcIOsgOEDATmy2VzCvMfoKvtsNIWHxp3qBI0PfwWA_wc05d7VN3t8MO90elm1Yh78GRCscTjXmuPTHP7PpJwfbhwKQOswbE7fjI1-qwHRuVMk6WJ4RyKEEyuGbQIXg-9wrAKiu2RA4JNkANX_z0X_fEWvmgqVeb0_Bek6QiFsxGLRdJdoz5c9JUjs7FYMF7Uk5Pg-XHhzQIRNETKdkHR2JGEyX-dt1fbLmIUahlx6XqpkQpjYauIwwDhL_ztK0iLAFaACvJ4VYHaLoHYRn59mrvwJjmyLt9ArjKTs6POnAMQnOV80Q1bDKPumBje7bJAT1cqidYZh4VzY-xAT73NClSuJ2meLIK5YKLndSPUaWFtuizcihTbh61-nDzKV64hvu5PZFRmy3fhXcVobZabzYNeWQUCFFgOiAKIhz0k4H95oBe9cGNPvKsy7ptCs9ws1489MGa58IR4wlPE/QVf8vJaF6dLSpMAsTz3USe_OZIzErOBX/11)

_**Indiana's 3rd Grade Literacy Rate Sees the Largest Gain in Indiana History**_
---
---
The Indiana Department of Education announced Wednesday the results from the 2024-2025 Indiana Reading Evaluation and Determination (IREAD) assessment, which showed a nearly five percentage point jump- the largest gain since the Department began IREAD in 2013. In a press release, the Indiana Secretary of Education, Dr. Katie Jenner, commented on the historic numbers: "Thanks to the hard work and collaboration of our educators, parents and families, students, and local communities - we have turned the page, with literacy rates now soaring at a historic pace. This is a time for celebration, and it is also a time to double-down on our commitment to helping even more students learn to read." Governor Braun also commented on the historic numbers: "As we work to make Indiana a beacon of freedom and opportunity, helping every Hoosier to live out their American dream starts with the ability to read. The number of Indiana students learning to read is growing at an unprecedented rate and is yet another example of how we are leading the nation in education. We will continue to raise the bar and set the model for what is possible when we prioritize educational outcomes and get back to the basics, focusing on the foundations that unlock a lifetime of learning and success." Governor Braun and Secretary Jenner via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/gUN2nzbweZ2a_bcuR1i3OherE5YeJVzlUDQ2BUKCjCv8bDizCxCbRtYghhknERst6MaomXgcJndNMe6QxLzSwO_pqvvYqHQjyXm7tW9-m4Fut3S7ZBb4GwltlxMtoX6NvcByKEs9I9D2TV0ZUjdbhVZo6DtLONFpa1BnveLEny2r-bSN8k0lDZ24in6_F9dIaczP9n2Yj24fCa6lovRa3IaJIlClBPRruT82QqqxDQw7-rr4x8EUSsrbagaoZ_z6ukc9LnWLIY6IB8Urt3bWd117YMKEO0dKxyTN5Q6zMgU5atWiyrrtF-Jl_VwPnjAYA6vAZwovpR24ml6TVKYqTJIuyRKhFwlj_nGeHG6_WRoRhlg9H6gme9-bnwwet2mORjTU4E1XNcJcfKgJbCBidDAWXQObuqeWaRh6YEcndMH-ackKOfOWOIinl_GExBKg6gV3eviiNsLKuXQRKsruAJRE-66f9jHVdsqxkWF9MuV6iq0O7PcBDdVu8z8-XGuGYARkFZbjrTPQ2s0mLdCIR1BCK_1aF4XCS67xdKRd9ps9UHjzMR5tRx4tQEkRn63w_Q/zJ14fsNAqDkR9C29sGwizsfWSKyPY_vX/11)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Back to School Friends, As Hoosier students and parents prepare for the new school year, Indiana Republicans have a lot to celebrate. This week, Governor Braun underscored his commitment to protecting our schools by appointing a proven leader to head Indiana’s new Office of School Safety. Secretary Julie Q. Smith has dedicated her career to keeping students safe, and her appointment is an important milestone in Governor Braun's public safety agenda and a major step forward in ensuring that every Hoosier student can learn in an environment where safety is never in question. Indiana also enters the new school year celebrating historic progress in literacy, with the latest statewide reading assessment showing the largest gains in our history. These results are proof that when parents, educators, and communities work together with a clear focus on fundamentals, students succeed. From safeguarding our schools to equipping students with the skills they need for lifelong success, our Republican leadership is delivering on their promise to make Indiana the best place in America to learn, grow, and achieve. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Announces Indiana's First Director of the Office of School Safety On Monday, Governor Braun reaffirmed his commitment to the safety of Hoosier students by announcing that Julie Q. Smith will be Indiana's first Director of the newly formed Office of School Safety. Sergeant Julie Q. Smith is a national instructor for the National Association of School Resource Officers and president of the Indiana School Resource Officers Administration. She recently retired from the Columbus Police Department, where she led the School Resource Officer Division. "As a national leader in school safety, Julie is uniquely qualified for this role and I have complete faith in her leadership of this important office." \- Governor Braun via a Indiana's 3rd Grade Literacy Rate Sees the Largest Gain in Indiana History The Indiana Department of Education announced Wednesday the results from the 2024-2025 Indiana Reading Evaluation and Determination (IREAD) assessment, which showed a nearly five percentage point jump- the largest gain since the Department began IREAD in 2013. In a press release, the Indiana Secretary of Education, Dr. Katie Jenner, commented on the historic numbers: "Thanks to the hard work and collaboration of our educators, parents and families, students, and local communities - we have turned the page, with literacy rates now soaring at a historic pace. This is a time for celebration, and it is also a time to double-down on our commitment to helping even more students learn to read." Governor Braun also commented on the historic numbers: "As we work to make Indiana a beacon of freedom and opportunity, helping every Hoosier to live out their American dream starts with the ability to read. The number of Indiana students learning to read is growing at an unprecedented rate and is yet another example of how we are leading the nation in education. We will continue to raise the bar and set the model for what is possible when we prioritize educational outcomes and get back to the basics, focusing on the foundations that unlock a lifetime of learning and success." body:

# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1872%2E582294%2E__LYBm)
Hi,
We usually send you updates about the campaign. **But today we want to hear from you.**
What do you want to ask Chris Pappas?
It can be serious or lighthearted. You can ask about his plans for the Senate, his thoughts on the biggest challenges facing New Hampshire, or even his favorite Seinfeld episode.
**Just hit reply and send in your question.**
Chris has always believed in staying connected and grounded in the people he serves. That means listening first and answering honestly.
Chris may answer your question in a video or email; if your question is chosen, we’ll make sure to keep your personal info private.
Looking forward to hearing from you,
Team Pappas

body:

Friend, Last month, a failed candidate who blamed Dominion Voting Systems for his loss threw a Molotov cocktail into a Colorado election office – directly targeting the room where ballots are counted. | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113435108/563759754/55160957?refcode=em-8.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTBkOTA0Yi1hOTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVACV1QBqZaoZfv3WNrgEH_wYAa4LLNJ9H3-iwocHpI=)****Longtime critic of voting machines charged in firebombing of Colorado election office**
---
Voting machines were destroyed. The clerk’s office was scorched. If it had happened during the day, people could’ve died.
This is what our election officials are facing across the country: threats, outright violence and a climate of fear fueled by conspiracy theories and election lies.
**And it’s happening because they’re simply doing their jobs.**
DASS is working around the clock to support election officials, combat disinformation, and elect democracy defenders. But we urgently need your help to scale up those efforts with the next election just over a year out.
[**Democratic Secretaries of State and state-level leaders are our last firewall against this assault on democracy.
