| | Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on**one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years**. A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue. This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws. With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, **it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.** **[Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113452105/563814651/-1725532854?refcode=081625_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZTU5NDBjLWNkN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AuXrZaaU72qyHomVh9zSk8tKEtLYHjX-IOwRK7w0k6g=)**

| | This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling. **We won’t sugarcoat this:** This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand. Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. **As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive** , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone. **[We can't do this alone. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never intended to run for office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I'll be honest: I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452176/563814838/1435897075?refcode=email_081625_bio-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTgxNjEwOS1jZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITE17cnwvW11ynkF5209-oMuHZ7_K287Azfh5kGi1Hw=&emci=3ebaccb8-7b78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ba816109-ce7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) I'll be honest, folks. I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.

This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end. **[But if you don’t have time, please, take a moment and chip in a couple bucks to my campaign today. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452177/563814839/1506335976?refcode=email_081625_bio-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTgxNjEwOS1jZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITE17cnwvW11ynkF5209-oMuHZ7_K287Azfh5kGi1Hw=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452178/563814840/1506335976?refcode=email_081625_bio-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTgxNjEwOS1jZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITE17cnwvW11ynkF5209-oMuHZ7_K287Azfh5kGi1Hw=)
---
Back in the mid-1980s, I was a geologist — until I was laid off. Two years later, I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, Wynkoop Brewing Company, in downtown Denver.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452179/563814841/1506335976?refcode=email_081625_bio-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTgxNjEwOS1jZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITE17cnwvW11ynkF5209-oMuHZ7_K287Azfh5kGi1Hw=)
I remember working 80-hour weeks. I remember lying awake at night wondering how we were going to make it. And I remember being so frustrated that our government was spending more time on decisions that’d help politicians get reelected than helping solve our problems.
So, I ran for Mayor. And once elected, I focused every day on making decisions based on what was best for Denver.
Then, I was elected Governor on the premise of uniting people, finding common ground, hashing things out, and getting things done.
And after we flipped Colorado’s Senate seat in 2020, I got my hands dirty working hard to deliver real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.

But look, I’ve also seen how broken Washington is. I see politicians who only listen to those who cut big campaign checks while ignoring the rest of us. And it’s clear we need more leaders who are willing to cut through the political deadlock and work to move this country forward.

Here's why I'm telling you this: **my story is the reason I remain grounded amid the nonsense and dysfunction that's happening in our government.**

Because with all the chaos in Washington, you need somebody who rolls up their sleeves and fights every day for all of us – not just those they agree with.

Like I said, I never thought I'd find myself in the U.S. Senate, but I’m running for re-election because Coloradans deserve a leader they can trust to do right by them. And I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who entered public service to do what's right for the people of my state.

That’s why I don't take money from corporate PACs like your typical politician. Instead, I rely on grassroots folks like you. And it’s why I'm depending on your contribution today to help us meet our mid-quarter fundraising goal. Even just $5 here or $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**[So I have to ask: will you make a donation of whatever is meaningful to you today? Together, we can defend this seat we flipped back in 2020 and keep power in the hands of Coloradans:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452180/563814842/1506335976?refcode=email_081625_bio-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTgxNjEwOS1jZTdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITE17cnwvW11ynkF5209-oMuHZ7_K287Azfh5kGi1Hw=)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The only way to stop this is to fight back—hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Right now, Texas Republicans are rigging the map. Redistricting is being weaponized to silence voters across our state. It’s not just gerrymandering anymore—it’s a power grab by a party so afraid of democracy, they’ll do anything to destroy it.
If we fail—if we don’t win power in the 2026 midterms—the consolidation of authoritarian control in the hands of Donald Trump will be nearly unstoppable. They know it. We know it. And the only way to stop it is to fight back—**hard.**
But this time, instead of waiting for the punch thrown by these would-be fascists to hit us, I want us to **punch first** , and I want us to **punch harder.**
That means organizing everywhere. Registering every voter. Showing up in every county—**especially the ones they’ve written off.** And it means funding the kind of grassroots movement that can keep beating back these attacks on our democracy.
We’re building that fight right now—but we can’t do it without you.
[**Rush a donation now to help us defend Texas and take back power in 2026.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250816.LrY2D9&refcode=ema20250816-240320&t=2&akid=240320%2E444211%2E6dhm_j)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250816.LrY2D9&refcode=ema20250816-240320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240320%2E444211%2E6dhm_j)**
Let me be clear: this isn’t just about redistricting. It’s about our freedom, our future, and whether we let authoritarianism tighten its grip on our country—or we break it apart with the power of the people.
Are you with us?
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250816-240320-footer&t=22&refcode2=240320_444211_6dhm_j&akid=240320%2E444211%2E6dhm_j)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240320%2E444211%2E6dhm_j), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=240320%2E444211%2E6dhm_j).

name: Patty Murray
subject: FWD: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
If we plan on taking back the Senate majority in 2026, Jon's reelection is key.
| | |
---
Peter,
Right now, my friend and fellow Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff is on the front lines of fighting to protect our democracy in the swing state of Georgia. **And if we plan on putting a stop to Trump's reckless agenda by taking back the Senate majority, holding on to Jon’s seat is key.**
But since his state went for Trump last year, pro-GOP billionaires are already pouring their fortunes into the 2026 race to flip Georgia's Senate seat red – and as we approach the midterms, that spending is guaranteed to soar.
Jon is a friend and colleague of mine who has truly met the moment with strong moral clarity and a fierce resolve to fight hard for what’s right. So, when he reached out to me earlier, I knew the best way I could help was by passing his message along to my dedicated grassroots supporters like you.
**[If that's all you need to hear, please consider splitting a gift between my campaign and Sen. Ossoff’s today to help him keep Georgia blue](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452215/563814993/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ4Y2MwMy1jZjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j2ppdtxg02Vj0oLdWe10M4H4IlgBBGpRTiEa7o6buI=) **– but otherwise, I'll let him take it from here.
Thank you for everything, and keep scrolling to see Jon's message below.

Patty Murray
\- - - - - - - - - Forwarded message \- - - - - - - - -
From: **Jon Ossoff [<info@e.electjon.com>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452216/563814994/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ4Y2MwMy1jZjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j2ppdtxg02Vj0oLdWe10M4H4IlgBBGpRTiEa7o6buI=)**
Subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
Date: August 16, 2025

| | Hey Peter, it’s Jon. _This just in:_ A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive **__$5 million__** ad buy attacking me.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452217/563814995/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ4Y2MwMy1jZjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j2ppdtxg02Vj0oLdWe10M4H4IlgBBGpRTiEa7o6buI=)
If you already know the stakes of this race – and you’re ready to fight – please use this link to split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Patty Murray's campaign today:
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452218/563814996/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ4Y2MwMy1jZjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j2ppdtxg02Vj0oLdWe10M4H4IlgBBGpRTiEa7o6buI=)
---
Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today.
This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me.
Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority – _they lock it in for the long term._
With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.
So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia – and the entire country is counting on us to not only hold the line but also send a clear message:
Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes.
We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights.
And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history.
I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.
**[So please, split a donation of $5 – or whatever you are in a place to give – between my re-election campaign and Patty Murray's campaign to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452219/563814997/-476769103?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ4Y2MwMy1jZjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j2ppdtxg02Vj0oLdWe10M4H4IlgBBGpRTiEa7o6buI=)**

And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you – for everything.

clean_body: If we plan on taking back the Senate majority in 2026, Jon's reelection is key. | | | Peter, Right now, my friend and fellow Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff is on the front lines of fighting to protect our democracy in the swing state of Georgia. And if we plan on putting a stop to Trump's reckless agenda by taking back the Senate majority, holding on to Jon’s seat is key. But since his state went for Trump last year, pro-GOP billionaires are already pouring their fortunes into the 2026 race to flip Georgia's Senate seat red – and as we approach the midterms, that spending is guaranteed to soar. Jon is a friend and colleague of mine who has truly met the moment with strong moral clarity and a fierce resolve to fight hard for what’s right. So, when he reached out to me earlier, I knew the best way I could help was by passing his message along to my dedicated grassroots supporters like you. = – but otherwise, I'll let him take it from here. Thank you for everything, and keep scrolling to see Jon's message below. Patty Murray \- - - - - - - - - Forwarded message \- - - - - - - - - From: Jon Ossoff = Subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me Date: August 16, 2025 | | Hey Peter, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me. = If you already know the stakes of this race – and you’re ready to fight – please use this link to split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Patty Murray's campaign today: | | = Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority – they lock it in for the long term. With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia – and the entire country is counting on us to not only hold the line but also send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone. = | | = Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining. And come next November, we will raise it higher. In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption. Thank you – for everything. – Jon | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Pramila
subject: They’re hoping we won’t notice the hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is what happens when MAGA controls the agenda.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250816-5346-footer&t=1&akid=5346%2E420207%2EXWfJMW)
Peter,
You’re not imagining it — Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies really are doing this:
* **Offering cash bonuses and student loan forgiveness to recruit new agents for ICE** , the same agency terrorizing our communities and carrying out an extremist anti-immigrant agenda.

* **Fighting tooth and nail to block student loan forgiveness** for teachers, nurses, and millions of other working class Americans being crushed by debt.

This is what happens when MAGA controls the agenda: they’ll use our tax dollars to supercharge Trump’s deportation machine and go after some of the most vulnerable people in the country, all while telling the rest of us we have to keep struggling.
**They’re hoping we won’t notice the hypocrisy, and won’t fight back.**
That’s why it’s critical that we push the truth out far and wide, and organize at every level to defeat their extremist, upside-down priorities.
But that work takes a considerable amount of resources — and since Pramila doesn’t take corporate PAC donations, she’s counting on grassroots donations from people like you to make it happen.
[**Peter, will you chip in $3 today so we can fight back against Trump’s ICE-first, people-last agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250816-1?refcode=em20250816-5346&amount=3&refcode2=5346_420207_XWfJMW&akid=5346%2E420207%2EXWfJMW)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250816-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250816-5346&refcode2=5346_420207_XWfJMW&akid=5346%2E420207%2EXWfJMW)**
When Trump and his MAGA allies show us who and what they value, we have a choice: get discouraged, or get organized. We’re choosing the second option — and we hope you will too.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250816-5346-footer&t=2&refcode2=5346_420207_XWfJMW&akid=5346%2E420207%2EXWfJMW)**

Friends, Texas Republicans are working overtime to carve up communities, silence dissenting voices, and rig the map to lock in their power -- no matter what voters want. This isn’t democracy. It’s time to fight fire with fire -- organizing in every corner of the country, calling out their attacks as often as we can, and making sure voters know exactly what’s at stake next year. name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Erie County can’t afford four more years of Brenton Davis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Peter, **Here’s what’s happening in Erie County — and why it matters for all of Pennsylvania.** On November 4, 2025, Erie County voters will choose their next County Executive — a critical office that controls the region’s budget, sets development priorities, and shapes the delivery of vital services. This race isn’t just local. It will impact working families across the state and send a signal about the kind of leadership we demand in Pennsylvania. Right now, that office is held by Brenton Davis — a corrupt, scandal-plagued Republican who is bad for Erie County and bad for our state. Since taking office, Davis has:
* Been entangled in lawsuits and ethics scandals.
* Taken $65,000 from a shady PAC tied to a single wealthy donor.
* Used his position to divide communities and reward insiders instead of serving working people.
* Tried to meddle in the Democratic primary — recklessly spending money to run attack ads against Christina Vogel before she was even his opponent.

That’s not leadership. That’s everything wrong with politics. **The Pennsylvania Working Families Party has endorsed Christina Vogel because she’s the opposite of Brenton Davis:**
* A job creator — Built two successful restaurants where employees are respected, supported with real benefits, and able to build lasting careers.
* An education champion — Helped launch Erie County Community College and has served on its board since day one, working to expand opportunities and open new doors for local students.
* Deeply rooted in her community — A mom of three, a neighbor, and a leader who listens and delivers results.

But Brenton Davis’s wealthy allies aren’t waiting until November — they’re already pouring money into his re-election and flooding Erie County with lies. If we don’t start fighting back now, he’ll have a head start that’s too big to close. **That’s why this is urgent: Your donation will be split between PA WFP and Christina Vogel’s campaign — every dollar fuels our fight to defeat Davis and elect Christina.** **[Chip in now — split a donation between PA WFP and Christina Vogel.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSC2uAzsbU71kg9pAcQY7RvfPUinUo5JkCANP_3Eh7YXn9sx3813AESv0N9RndIRaJbW0YA4996gRNFlJcOGx0ipNl-EZwBObPrrYcjxAmGSHcJVHX0Rx1fZaOqSU7Loj0pd_NQy4gbdDPZSjLR2s4iQCrtmfBuyvFF_djD-vaJf2sQN2PrAEpN60-Cv5Kdmp-UGROkjlvMVxdgh18F6RB-Oi3Pa14ZwOM4pVb-ZgDdnlXe_ineveqyNyZ4BQgWTTSLPsnAZkWwqZtUGahEi2pwEsmWU2SiHzhX_njxUVClRDToYLZW4Rt1nUjQ-oPk_yeFlVBe0E9W8OBcvD68wODWH1TEmc8DbIaFUAdu9li4QAG_PiwtA8ydUKdvneQLxjz5QL2dluN8rYy7t-Z5E1sOwg/4j3/BWvNI-j0QaiMNBzxERAR-Q/h0/h001.xO7ynQXDWscdftjj3EgNK-TAFurIZSMFfpHIGP3vPEA)** **[Split a donation »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSC2uAzsbU71kg9pAcQY7RvfPUinUo5JkCANP_3Eh7YXn9sx3813AESv0N9RndIRaJbbz894odNqPvXCHgKYsRqKILBO1rLzzTDyIQQXKD68qmPlZ6PzzBXOuM0JH4qngh_yHnQSkojySwdUKpb1aLZ46SHNbUYJ1zsdihFR8i7IErC0NNP2rBCFoYVMAgy5JAIk_0xXFyxQ7aU88HsJv5pDxrlhxhMJKjHim_k0WUXiVgg-dP2yQvKQIupUl_OIy2tfHLUO9xJlCbc6kFqBh28v3EN8rNjeCLwRAnVg3hzFFztKdwkJuV6yw-sjXvlVn5F4etH2hyLO6h4d1PXzwWu6Coqg11hF6VX8mU6HbGJ7NTQJ1IPiactolGMELj-01aYEAoviLdb7iZEqX7s97xtAw/4j3/BWvNI-j0QaiMNBzxERAR-Q/h1/h001.UfCrx77VGIzFb5GX47TCuiS9rggK7YzxcUSJFtBPnNc)** Together, we can flip this seat, send Brenton Davis packing, and deliver a County Executive who will work for all of us. clean_body: | | | Peter, Here’s what’s happening in Erie County — and why it matters for all of Pennsylvania. On November 4, 2025, Erie County voters will choose their next County Executive — a critical office that controls the region’s budget, sets development priorities, and shapes the delivery of vital services. This race isn’t just local. It will impact working families across the state and send a signal about the kind of leadership we demand in Pennsylvania. Right now, that office is held by Brenton Davis — a corrupt, scandal-plagued Republican who is bad for Erie County and bad for our state. Since taking office, Davis has: Been entangled in lawsuits and ethics scandals. Taken $65,000 from a shady PAC tied to a single wealthy donor. Used his position to divide communities and reward insiders instead of serving working people. Tried to meddle in the Democratic primary — recklessly spending money to run attack ads against Christina Vogel before she was even his opponent. That’s not leadership. That’s everything wrong with politics. The Pennsylvania Working Families Party has endorsed Christina Vogel because she’s the opposite of Brenton Davis: A job creator — Built two successful restaurants where employees are respected, supported with real benefits, and able to build lasting careers. An education champion — Helped launch Erie County Community College and has served on its board since day one, working to expand opportunities and open new doors for local students. Deeply rooted in her community — A mom of three, a neighbor, and a leader who listens and delivers results. But Brenton Davis’s wealthy allies aren’t waiting until November — they’re already pouring money into his re-election and flooding Erie County with lies. If we don’t start fighting back now, he’ll have a head start that’s too big to close. That’s why this is urgent: Your donation will be split between PA WFP and Christina Vogel’s campaign — every dollar fuels our fight to defeat Davis and elect Christina. Together, we can flip this seat, send Brenton Davis packing, and deliver a County Executive who will work for all of us. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member!** Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . _**AP NEWS**_ : **The VA wants to end coverage of abortion for US military veterans**

_"President Donald Trump’s administration is calling to remove abortion coverage from the list of medical benefits for veterans and their families, saying it’s not needed."_

Peter,

The Trump administration is demanding the Department of Veterans Affairs to enact an abortion ban **with no exceptions for rape, incest, or even the health or life of the mother.**

This is the most aggressive ban in the entire country— _and they’re testing it on our veterans_. These are people who have fought for our freedoms and rights, and now, they’re having one of their most basic healthcare rights taken away. _**It’s despicable.**_

Women should have the right to make their own healthcare decisions. They should know their doctors will be there for them if they face complications. Our veterans, those who fight to defend our basic freedoms, deserve nothing less. This is not how we treat those who have served, and we can’t let it stand. Kim has always been a champion for women’s rights, and she will never stop standing up for our veterans, too.

subject: Virginia Mercury: “the margins here have beenrazor-thin”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | The _Virginia Mercury_ writes that the razor-thin 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates is at stake this November - and our race in VA-HD22 is a key battleground.
They say: Del. Ian Lovejoy, R-Prince William, is looking to hold onto his seat in one of the most closely watched matchups in Northern Virginia. He faces a challenge from Elizabeth Guzman, who represented a neighboring district from 2018 to 2024 and is aiming for a return to the House.
The margins here have been razor-thin. In 2024, Harris edged Trump 49% to 47.9%, and Kaine carried the district by just over 2 points.
Over 6,000 donations from people like you have helped public school mom and social worker Elizabeth Guzman outraise MAGA Republican Ian Lovejoy - putting us in a _strong position_ if we can sustain our fundraising in the final days.
**Defending and expanding our VA House of Delegates this November will strike another blow against MAGA Republicans ahead of the midterms - and national Republicans are pouring MILLIONS into this race to stop us.**

clean_body: | | | The Virginia Mercury writes that the razor-thin 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates is at stake this November - and our race in VA-HD22 is a key battleground. They say: Del. Ian Lovejoy, R-Prince William, is looking to hold onto his seat in one of the most closely watched matchups in Northern Virginia. He faces a challenge from Elizabeth Guzman, who represented a neighboring district from 2018 to 2024 and is aiming for a return to the House. The margins here have been razor-thin. In 2024, Harris edged Trump 49% to 47.9%, and Kaine carried the district by just over 2 points. Over 6,000 donations from people like you have helped public school mom and social worker Elizabeth Guzman outraise MAGA Republican Ian Lovejoy - putting us in a strong position if we can sustain our fundraising in the final days. Defending and expanding our VA House of Delegates this November will strike another blow against MAGA Republicans ahead of the midterms - and national Republicans are pouring MILLIONS into this race to stop us. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Robert Garcia
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Do you support Democratic efforts to fight back against Republican gerrymandering?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Add your name >>
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452965/563817759/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDUzZjA3Yi1kMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzQNrcKgKCZ2hi8fThuYloj5ZtBlrZYm6f5-HXGn-XU=)
Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
A crisis is unfolding in Texas — and it’s a battle for the future of our democracy.
Republicans, under pressure from Donald Trump, are pushing a mid-decade redistricting plan that could add five new GOP congressional seats, tipping the scales in Washington before voters have their say.
But Democrats aren’t just standing by and giving in. Texas lawmakers are fighting back — even fleeing the state, and putting their own jobs and freedom on the line — to block the vote.
And now, Democratic leaders in California, New York, and elsewhere are looking at their options to beat the Republicans at their own game.
**[That’s why I’m reaching out today. As Republicans try to rig the system in their favor, I want to know what you think. So let me know: Do YOU support Democratic efforts to fight back against Republican gerrymandering?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452966/563817763/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDUzZjA3Yi1kMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzQNrcKgKCZ2hi8fThuYloj5ZtBlrZYm6f5-HXGn-XU=&emci=1dcdc784-2b7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7453f07b-d37a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)**
[HELL YES >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452967/563817767/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDUzZjA3Yi1kMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzQNrcKgKCZ2hi8fThuYloj5ZtBlrZYm6f5-HXGn-XU=&emci=1dcdc784-2b7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7453f07b-d37a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)
[NO >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452968/563817771/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDUzZjA3Yi1kMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzQNrcKgKCZ2hi8fThuYloj5ZtBlrZYm6f5-HXGn-XU=&emci=1dcdc784-2b7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7453f07b-d37a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)
[UNSURE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113452969/563817788/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDUzZjA3Yi1kMzdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzQNrcKgKCZ2hi8fThuYloj5ZtBlrZYm6f5-HXGn-XU=&emci=1dcdc784-2b7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7453f07b-d37a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)
I mean it when I say that democracy is on the line here.
Gerrymandering isn’t just political gamesmanship — it silences communities and weaponizes our votes.
It’s not just Texas’ fight. Blue states are preparing to push back with fair maps of their own, demanding that voters choose their representatives and not the other way around.
**But it’s risky. Our colleagues in Texas face fines, arrest warrants, and legal threats. They’re putting it all on the line, and we must stand with them.**
**[This isn’t a sideshow. This is a fight over whether our democracy will serve people or politicians. clean_body: Add your name >> = Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia. A crisis is unfolding in Texas — and it’s a battle for the future of our democracy. Republicans, under pressure from Donald Trump, are pushing a mid-decade redistricting plan that could add five new GOP congressional seats, tipping the scales in Washington before voters have their say. But Democrats aren’t just standing by and giving in. Texas lawmakers are fighting back — even fleeing the state, and putting their own jobs and freedom on the line — to block the vote. And now, Democratic leaders in California, New York, and elsewhere are looking at their options to beat the Republicans at their own game. I mean it when I say that democracy is on the line here. Gerrymandering isn’t just political gamesmanship — it silences communities and weaponizes our votes. It’s not just Texas’ fight. Blue states are preparing to push back with fair maps of their own, demanding that voters choose their representatives and not the other way around. But it’s risky. Our colleagues in Texas face fines, arrest warrants, and legal threats. They’re putting it all on the line, and we must stand with them. We’re not just fighting maps. We’re fighting for accountability, representation, and truth in politics. Thanks for using your voice, Robert Garcia = = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

---
In a press conference brimming with characteristic bluntness and policy clarity, President Donald Trump offered a bold suggestion to a skeptical media: if you don’t think D.C. has a crime problem, ride along with the police and see for yourself. The remarks came Wednesday from the Kennedy Center, where the President addressed ongoing questions about [...]

# **[California School Board Votes On Ban Amid States Lawsuit With Trump](http://trk.libertyledger._Ch0zGsiJ2laz-0Aug)**
---
In a bold and potentially precedent-setting move, the Kern County Board of Education in California voted Tuesday to defy state policy and bar biological males from competing in girls’ sports—directly aligning itself with federal Title IX interpretations championed by President Donald Trump’s administration.

His vote to slash Medicaid puts FIVE Arizona hospitals --\- including three in our own district -- at risk of closing. Now, rural families, seniors, veterans, and so many people right here in AZ-02 could lose access to lifesaving care. ~~ ~~ Begin forwarded message from Jonathan Nez: Peter, Eli Crane had a choice: stand with Arizonans or stand with Trump and his Big, Ugly Bill. But instead of voting to protect healthcare, he chose to protect tax breaks for billionaires. Now, five Arizona hospitals could be at risk of shutting down, including three right here in our district. ~~ ~~ The Arizona Hospital and Healthcare Association warned for months that the consequences would be a devastating crisis for all patients -- people on Medicaid, private insurance, and rural families alike. But here's the truth: rural communities like ours could lose their primary, or sometimes only, source of emergency care. Families could be left driving HOURS for lifesaving treatment. Eli Crane knew this --_and voted to defund Medicaid and gut public healthcare anyways. ~~ ~~ Thanks for standing with me in this fight. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My story is not so different
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e461235c18d54b1ea38a5b12c39ed0eb&_e=ScKx5xq4imQSMHxGzd6I31B8xTR0-laTXR_1SqZJkYBF8lua6IBcKG-qL7R6iVUGEHWFToqO_7gi41jC3nxVpw6Dtzg_KiLYKIpXYCY9T9tD5485k-34cBpPj8NpCfS30OFCQKsI1CDNvzK3ZHFpN2ZZhWYZtkMm6AqS5YiIo2tLxVLX_ZCrw1CEdNFF9n2f7jOdyCvJeut_pnoYuFBvLaSnCcWFyjOTBvBpcjPVwVplywtMHWXmU28dVMPjxB_KzmLBUezG8ZDjya98EPKNDBBJ69agzCJKv6hyJ7QT-3HFLYeazF9mq7Y8wcr0gLY1ZH_mcO5zLjM602hXwhyCE7CFN3CMgL15HaL3FZ_7QjKzRX3IZEn55lxR2KKctuTeQjHI9gA3Kpiacj2Mo6jOJQwf_jQyXrH32LbxkNazVm1iYeg2yqd2ktnp_VKzLMYzFmzSKMZxihtYS_gPIb6D3esp6F5a_z5TnfY8ZkfgvNp7olcTSRGiqyKKqwOTiBl2W6FV6dNaPhhOOmoIiB3V_mPIGE_a1iPkV7DtRN4J_XDFzaJLlvkezGWLoUds36iOvxP8qxw9_ulzoJodMK60rbwxStM76GGEtvtjiTRcjAsFZfvniSLbHj--G0z4-KQ32oKpewhA_yk_X6-HfVeITrLmkWrz8vK8kt0vWpIEaOY%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e461235c18d54b1ea38a5b12c39ed0eb&_e=ScKx5xq4imQSMHxGzd6I31B8xTR0-laTXR_1SqZJkYBF8lua6IBcKG-qL7R6iVUGEHWFToqO_7gi41jC3nxVpw6Dtzg_KiLYKIpXYCY9T9tD5485k-34cBpPj8NpCfS30OFCQKsI1CDNvzK3ZHFpN2ZZhWYZtkMm6AqS5YiIo2tLxVLX_ZCrw1CEdNFF9n2f7jOdyCvJeut_pnoYuFBvLaSnCcWFyjOTBvBpcjPVwVobE1dCduNTJKqpHfWRiJPilDaJCnEtPWEqOaCXDNqJ-UaPZKnFE1dzHM94XpX-hdx9BmYyxc-I2_m8-UosFE_Jy8b6QaNpZyxV6HjZ9dBvNIec8VX_xr-vL2jKq0qrQyw_-YJJpdysW9qRJ_soQBL4cG7CumXyHPgxqkWoqRmFq4X0AMgEp_hGKHSft2jhp7UPwIWkOXqIQuXqqqUx4kYjCKM3zHNzCgFp6WUguMZrFFYiIVsGfLh2xba2i1C9Wwute3L05mfoDvu2hxwa9bGSKaFJxo_5CXc6RqLGTTeAcfODsjxq8YHQBpd0HaT4HYVo8RcHux1hvwa-KWnn3SXySeJANP4oP2bhINefepVZAXnxnhyt7MKPyYkR8BIlF14NaWauPlGZ3HJE3Mdc7vXIKIkvneHYnrjhH3SRsDt-orSe2OUnLWFaNHQXIRMaE74%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e461235c18d54b1ea38a5b12c39ed0eb&_e=ScKx5xq4imQSMHxGzd6I31B8xTR0-laTXR_1SqZJkYBF8lua6IBcKG-qL7R6iVUGEHWFToqO_7gi41jC3nxVpw6Dtzg_KiLYKIpXYCY9T9tD5485k-34cBpPj8NpCfS30OFCQKsI1CDNvzK3ZHFpN2ZZhWYZtkMm6AqS5YiIo2tLxVLX_ZCrw1CEdNFF9n2f7jOdyCvJeut_pnoYuFBvLaSnCcWFyjOTBvBpcjPVwVpqhHtKp1upejKVGaoFmKd1WSMkIXhrxtKhAicbqPg59T2Q7eX2T1L4QUzmg0RjgUACPQfzUkxKAOAz8DwuHVTG8A5rhljx8CmHkV18b87X2S0NEr5x44stFg3rPgva8edSMlpg_-XZ6aJ-Rjw9sr2J6pT2ErrH20pCOSupmwRfZC501p3KRZt-GD3wYO1AR_iImwoOdAdI2fIwapYqghxR6wUirJgowUNjdDzEeZlw1O9LGtwStG1HNUT2Pzj-TUZpmkvzHHzF63Od7S2eBiq7wr-OqLqGG_O83b-ds_GAdpaN95FMZ-bU6MSNBk_lMBIqrsyRynPByREkJtEYX7n6Eb27u8sfiFO5LZGFEFejDhkKexl_CARJONpKqZ9zymt_d4wGAUKsXEf0S_i19RNZFr--QfYTvmtXru80bYTqCDCrIw-9n850UebUOfgIcQs%3D)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e461235c18d54b1ea38a5b12c39ed0eb&_e=ScKx5xq4imQSMHxGzd6I31B8xTR0-laTXR_1SqZJkYBF8lua6IBcKG-qL7R6iVUGEHWFToqO_7gi41jC3nxVpw6Dtzg_KiLYKIpXYCY9T9tD5485k-34cBpPj8NpCfS30OFCQKsI1CDNvzK3ZHFpN2ZZhWYZtkMm6AqS5YiIo2tLxVLX_ZCrw1CEdNFF9n2f7jOdyCvJeut_pnoYuFBvLaSnCcWFyjOTBvBpcjPVwVpxQqtcx1dhrJPKqvg3rSfvImHyLUxtW8p5fGzEd-mw_cjfPUk2-jehdlGfiiTuNwcgVg906lC40qOYkerkwJBn2eSfGxFeWw1E7yju7e7h1DieWYCvRem-2HnjTG7t-4RefSb0LgvQjEZZql1PoWY1RQn-wPoIOXkYm2waFXI5r7uanz5bBq0r6rYUHVPHdOhpQaT3POyhXzaonjkEE0vcM_y-F8ajREblCs8uYWwMFoxFCkeOzxsAlMlem8PYrQuo1JsbAl2h7Y_5zxNReq5yyW-PSTkgr300m1KefmB8cKvwvz6xJV0wX2Moz7jEe68khfpNW4v7LC1hI6BcFGOQqf7XpLFrGKxINy6C7FnG78XrPAjW_EOJLfYDBFgtQps-Nmehk-xHlSx4gHocJeWDOJvWBBBpfpUT_69swK1nvsMm83EGcnwDB31dYTf5opE%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e461235c18d54b1ea38a5b12c39ed0eb&_e=ScKx5xq4imQSMHxGzd6I35rzkIC-wyc0-dhysrNb1Eusgl7YQSt7tUS1Hag39tgLE0Lq2sargVIM1BHKxgs1-YNWHZufncsAKqkTue2fDRcbZhUiUv18RqnyXnv56qtr9Pl4pX931urCsykTpwXmJox1onV-oEfow389riiYxktOosZkGET2rqy8c60R3mb4NKT750XqVr9YeM_phBNb9_NP7kF9oK2akB1PUHqTKDByNZAD5jOICiW8L2r64ttvRbZ7cIPxgY9yKYCjhNiGW2wdSM4jDgf4p9Tfh1qB16XLDkl8FQSl5WGBI_fCvwLhVAtUc3FJiRKDJqgFLKOVyp2wYa5IA5M3eI0eq0eMlZI%3D)

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: 11,000 Strong
subject: We just made history. Now let’s win.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Last night, 11,000 people joined our virtual town hall. That is the largest town hall in our district’s history. We are innovating. We are crushing the field.
Here is what that means:
* We can reach people where they are and bring new voices into the fight
* We can organize faster than Trump and his Republican puppets
* We can turn energy into votes, volunteers, and victories
The “strongly worded letter” era is over. I’ll take the fight to Trump’s agenda. I’ll protect our rights, our schools, and our future. I won’t let cynics or chaos win.
Fuel the Fight. Power the Win. We are building fair maps , protecting voting rights , and defending our freedom . We will beat Trump and the GOP by organizing together and telling the truth.
Chip In Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?]

name: Stand with PBS & NPR (via VPP)
subject: (fwd) Emergency Petition >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re waiting on you...
| **Friend, did you miss our last message?**

Trump has defunded the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, causing them to shut down ENTIRELY — we’re absolutely heartbroken.

We need to make sure Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) are standing with PBS & NPR in their fight ahead. And make no mistake, this _will_ be a fight.

[**You can still join us in calling on Congress to SAVE PBS & NPR from MAGA destruction — but time is running out. Please, friend, will you sign onto our time-sensitive petition to save PBS & NPR? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE PBS & NPR FROM MAGA DESTRUCTION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)
---
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
***** BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE *****
[**SAVE PBS AND NPR FROM MAGA DESTRUCTION: ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR EMERGENCY PETITION CALLING ON CONGRESS TO SAVE PUBLIC BROADCASTING »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE PBS & NPR FROM MAGA DESTRUCTION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)
---
_Friend, here’s what you need to know:_

**1.** Trump DEFUNDED $1.1 billion from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, __effectively shutting down PBS and NPR.__

**2.** Under Project 2025, ANY media that criticizes Trump is at risk — so he’s abusing his power to go after anyone who tells the TRUTH!

**3.** This won’t just hurt Democrats — it will hurt ALL OF US. Especially in rural, red districts!

[**This isn’t just an attack on the free press — it’s an attack on our Democracy! We refuse to sit back and let Trump get away with this, but we need your help: Add your name to help us SAVE public broadcasting from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)
[ADD MY NAME: SAVE PBS & NPR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-npr-pbs?source=VPP_20250816_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)
---
We need all hands on deck,
Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20963%2E878179%2ECKaYJe)

name: EMILYs List
subject: RE: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. orders review on abortion pills >>
body:
This is your chance to help shape Democratic strategy, Peter |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113454012/563821530/93694709?refcode=WUENE832_20250816_PillsSurveyRS_ALL&sourceid=1056828&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJlYWU5Mi1kYjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_1zH4gCKDXKf0lKDIKHDraxTO3AP03TToRbxHMGDPE=&emci=e601b2ff-4779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4fbeae92-db7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934) Even when it's not front page news, Republicans are constantly working to undermine reproductive rights nationwide, at every level of government. We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions — and we need your insight! | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113454015/563821533/93694709?refcode=WUENE832_20250816_PillsSurveyRS_ALL&sourceid=1056828&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJlYWU5Mi1kYjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_1zH4gCKDXKf0lKDIKHDraxTO3AP03TToRbxHMGDPE=&emci=e601b2ff-4779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4fbeae92-db7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934)
---
Peter,

Earlier this year, GOP think tanks released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. **And RFK Jr. took the bait.** He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care.

We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond!

We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible.
[**This is your chance to help shape the strategy of our team, Peter. Please complete the survey by 11:59 p.m. tonight to make sure your voice is heard in this critical moment:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113454017/563821537/93694709?refcode=WUENE832_20250816_PillsSurveyRS_ALL&sourceid=1056828&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJlYWU5Mi1kYjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_1zH4gCKDXKf0lKDIKHDraxTO3AP03TToRbxHMGDPE=&emci=e601b2ff-4779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4fbeae92-db7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113454021/563821542/93694709?refcode=WUENE832_20250816_PillsSurveyRS_ALL&sourceid=1056828&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJlYWU5Mi1kYjdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_1zH4gCKDXKf0lKDIKHDraxTO3AP03TToRbxHMGDPE=&emci=e601b2ff-4779-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4fbeae92-db7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934)

the EMILYs List team

clean_body: This is your chance to help shape Democratic strategy, Peter | Even when it's not front page news, Republicans are constantly working to undermine reproductive rights nationwide, at every level of government. We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions — and we need your insight! | Peter, Earlier this year, GOP think tanks released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. And RFK Jr. took the bait. He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care. We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond! We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible. Thank you for your input, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
There’s never been more evidence that voters are fed up with far-right Republican policies:
Just recently, Republican Rep. Doug LaMalfa held his first town hall meeting since Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill became law. And despite his Northern California district being reliably red, he was faced with a packed house of voters angry about his betrayal.
He received emotional questions on how he could support a bill that is going to devastate the region's health infrastructure — including cuts that could force more rural hospitals to close in the district.
All across California, voters are rising up against the Members of Congress who betrayed their interests by slashing healthcare and food assistance while giving tax cuts to billionaires. Now it’s up to us to amplify their message and anger. Will you pitch in a donation to our Fight Back Fund to defeat the swing seat Republicans who turned their back on California? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]The community room where Rep. LaMalfa was packed to the brim, with some constituents lined up outside.
Staffers passed out green and red placards to participants to signal whether they agreed with what Rep. LaMalfa was saying or not.
The meeting was a sea of red signs in opposition — along with a constant stream of boos and jeers.
Rep. LaMalfa repeated Donald Trump’s same tired line, that there will be no healthcare cuts — only elimination of waste, fraud, and abuse. But the crowd already knows that the math isn’t mathing.
Rep. LaMalfa then tried to blame Gov. Gavin Newsom, which also went over like a lead balloon.
Our message is starting to get out there. The energy for change is mounting. More and more, voters understand how terrible this administration has been for them and their families. Now we need to amplify their voices further and make sure every single swing seat voter knows too. Will you pitch in a donation to amplify the voices of everyday Californians? # **[Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...
Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.
And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.
NASA did their best to keep it secret...
But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.
**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/625c7e30-940c-45fe-8619-e57bcf95a887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Suspicious Socialist! Mamdani's wealth disclosure doesn't add up
Socialist mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani **[received nearly $10 million in public matching funds](https://substack.com/redirect/c538cda2-4cf0-49d5-9b8a-7db07bfcfbd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite financial disclosure discrepancies, the NY Post reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b125faa6-0659-4024-a992-1677f24faaeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Something doesn 't add up** \- The NYC frontrunner has contradictory information between his city Conflicts of Interest Board filing and state Legislative Ethics Commission filings regarding asset ownership and values.

* **Major inconsistencies found in Uganda land ownership timeline and stock holdings** \- Mamdani's city filing claims he owned $100,000-$250,000 vacant land in Uganda since March 2016 and stocks worth $5,000-$55,000, while his state filings for 2020-2024 say he owned the land since 2012 and listed no stocks, only retirement securities under $2,000.
* **Competitors Adams and Cuomo denied matching funds while Mamdani approved** \- Two of Mamdani's top rivals, Mayor Eric Adams and former Governor Andrew Cuomo, have been denied millions in matching funds by the Campaign Finance Board for various violations, highlighting the apparent inconsistent treatment.
* **Critics question potential bias and call for accountability** \- Defense lawyer and mayoral candidate Jim Walden accused Mamdani of "understating his wealth" and called for transparency, while Democratic consultant Hank Sheinkopf suggested oversight agencies might be ignoring discrepancies due to fears of being accused of Islamophobia, with potential fines up to $40,000 for knowingly false statements.

subject: NEW POLL: MAGA Ciattarelli is catching up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
**🔵 Mikie Sherrill - 48%**
**🔴 Jack Ciattarelli - 42%**
**⚪ Undecided - 9%**
**This new poll shows Mikie’s MAGA opponent just barely trailing Mikie in the race for governor — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the result.**
**[We knew this race was going to be close, Peter, and this poll proves it. And with Ciattarelli launching one false attack after another, we have no time to waste getting Mikie’s message out. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: We’re Rolling Into AZ, NV & NM—Join the Tour!
body:
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/UoMhAZ7CFxoZJLJo6M5fbUAEU04LPqTN219fQmpugbU=418)Patriot–The Only Citizens Vote Bus Tour is rolling across America, and we can’t wait to see you! At every stop, we’re rallying Americans to demand the SAVE Act—so only U.S. citizens can vote in our federal elections.**UPCOMING STOPS****Las Vegas, NV**
**Tuesday, Aug. 19th at 9:00 AM**
Emerald Room at Ahern Hotel
300 W Sahara Ave
Las Vegas, NV 89102[ _**RSVP**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp.me%2Fvegas/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/ys5AGBeI90tnKJirGQ52sspptYxRa0p_Ln91SbF10Qc=418)**Scottsdale, AZ**
**Wednesday, Aug. 20th at 10:00 AM**
Dillon Precision
8009 E Dillons Way
Scottsdale, AZ 85620[ _**RSVP**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp.me%2Fscottsdale/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/57VexuDsIZJyX1URcJIoWa_yy44bp64JP4WRNZNpriE=418)**Tucson, AZ**
**Wednesday, Aug. 20th at 3:00 PM**
Bridge Church (West)
8150 N Sandy Desert Tr
Tucson, AZ 85741[ _**RSVP**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp.me%2Ftuscon/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/1VC1dS-Hxv2SBBpWvJ_DNmrsFqA1HTsZMmRCp4Vn11I=418)**Las Cruces, NM**
**Thursday, Aug. 21st at 11:00 AM**
Albert Johnson Park
896 N. Main St
Las Cruces, NM 88001[ _**RSVP**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp.me%2Flascruces/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/fbL0gQTZ6cyip5lPECAElsX07q04a2JieykAEQgAX9o=418) You can RSVP above, or for more details and to sign up for other Only Citizens Vote Month activities, visit [_**demandonlycitizensvote.com**_](http://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/http:%2F%2Fwww.demandonlycitizensvote.com/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/XJXr0pdpdub5u6pliWeqh9rBUM5OGg8YPV8MSBINsyA=418).**_There are two other critical activities I’m asking you to join us for._****First** — **sign up to host a sign-waving rally in your community on Saturday, August 23rd**. Patriots nationwide will be out making noise for the SAVE Act, and the more rallies we have, the louder our message. It doesn’t have to be long — 30 to 60 minutes is perfect. Grab a few friends, find a shady spot, wave your signs, snap some pictures, and send them to [_**photos@teapartypatriots.org**_](http://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/photos@teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/B240gTV5IqC58zPry3o9bGPSFxtXxl-YNshob8qwSTg=418). Every rally counts toward saving American elections. [_**Sign up here.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonly-citizens-vote-month%2F/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/P2wRCNZlWit7GV9lCPTt9MWvHAYvWEuJotD-1Lh693Q=418)**Second** — **if there’s any way you can be in Washington, D.C., on September 10th, please come!** A small turnout will give the mainstream media and opponents of election integrity the excuse they need to kill the SAVE Act. Let’s show up in force and send a message they can’t ignore: **Only Americans vote in American elections**. _Drive, fly, do whatever it takes — we need you there._ [_**RSVP here.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonlycitizensvotedc%2F/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/nTqx-bTYbEu75Chq72vr_jjxNylOyUIDEbA56Hc9QCI=418) We’re counting on you to join us, bring friends and family, and show Washington that the American people are united in protecting our elections. Every stop matters—and every voice counts.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin ** _The SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act)_**_is a commonsense bill that would require individuals to provide documentary proof of U.S. citizenship when registering to vote in federal elections. It closes loopholes in current law that allow noncitizens to register and even vote simply by checking a box. The SAVE Act is a critical step toward restoring integrity to our elections and ensuring that only American citizens vote._[ CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/1kcgabr4n5JVh6OUJDG3tE9AxDECOJYHJb0b7o-NF54=418) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/hT4V9ehfeV8FRa1-t7B_PPlgGbwWC2QrtQ4QM1-5hpw=418)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/IOXNZDd4CYqSZs7tNzSknBuA9A3rWiGeu_ETBujzau8=418) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000198b49f5b07-06251a9b-f756-4aaa-a405-8a6d6cd101a5-000000/f_WrSwgAkp_GYan1YZvKHVwIC4XJ5Q8aQlAspK-aWLQ=418).

I have spent hundreds of hours on the ground in Orange County and the Inland Empire, listening to folks who are deeply concerned about my opponent Young Kim’s alignment with the MAGA agenda.

**She refuses to hold a town hall or even look her constituents in the eye. It is unacceptable, and it is why I am committing to holding town halls where I can hear directly from the community. I have just held my first virtual town hall, and I have held open, public meetings across the district.**

Her inaction is especially abhorrent after she broke her promise to CA-40 and voted to gut $880 BILLION from Medicaid and billions more from food assistance that working families rely on.

But, the truth is that the national GOP is not about to let this seat go easily. We have already seen attacks and outside spending in this race, and it will only worsen the closer we move to Election Day.

That is what makes benchmarks like this one so critical. Unlike others in this race, I cannot self-fund my campaign or rely on ultra-wealthy donors. This movement is built from the ground up with supporters like you chipping in a few dollars when they can.

clean_body: | = = | | = I have spent hundreds of hours on the ground in Orange County and the Inland Empire, listening to folks who are deeply concerned about my opponent Young Kim’s alignment with the MAGA agenda. She refuses to hold a town hall or even look her constituents in the eye. It is unacceptable, and it is why I am committing to holding town halls where I can hear directly from the community. I have just held my first virtual town hall, and I have held open, public meetings across the district. Her inaction is especially abhorrent after she broke her promise to CA-40 and voted to gut $880 BILLION from Medicaid and billions more from food assistance that working families rely on. But, the truth is that the national GOP is not about to let this seat go easily. We have already seen attacks and outside spending in this race, and it will only worsen the closer we move to Election Day. That is what makes benchmarks like this one so critical. Unlike others in this race, I cannot self-fund my campaign or rely on ultra-wealthy donors. This movement is built from the ground up with supporters like you chipping in a few dollars when they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. Here’s the deal, friend...

**FIRST:** Glenn Youngkin brought MAGA extremism to Virginia.

**THEN:** Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears took it even further – _opposing marriage equality, attacking reproductive freedom, and siding with the far-right every chance she gets._

**NOW:** Abigail Spanberger is stepping up to protect our freedoms and restore common sense – but she’s up against the same deep-pocketed donors that funded Youngkin’s win.

[If we want to defeat Earle-Sears, crush her extreme agenda, and send a Democrat to the Governors Mansion, we need to start organizing now.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66318?t=5&akid=23293%2E4449941%2E6Zpm21)

Earle-Sears wants to take our country back decades, friend. See for yourself:
**_Earle-Sears on Marriage Equality:_**
_While Gov. Youngkin signed a law protecting same‐sex marriage, Earle‐Sears scribbled a handwritten note on the bill saying she was**“morally opposed.”**_

**_Earle-Sears on Reproductive Rights:_**
_Earle‐Sears left a note expressing opposition to the constitutional amendment to protect abortion access – and she's consistently backed extreme restrictions._
This isn’t just rhetoric – these are real threats to Virginia’s freedoms.
Thankfully, our Democrat Abigail Spanberger is fighting **DAY** and **NIGHT** to keep Virginia moving in the right direction.
[But if she’s going to compete with the Republican Campaign Machine _(and the access to ultra-wealthy donors that comes with it)_ , we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you on our team.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66318?t=13&akid=23293%2E4449941%2E6Zpm21)

name: Abigail
subject: asking one last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our mid-month deadline is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_Tonight's deadline is a big one for our campaign._
And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before our mid-month deadline at midnight to become one of my Founding Donors?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113455012/563825166/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-16_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZhMGQ5MjgtZTg3YS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uBDaBzcaahlc7Z9oq0do_ZOE3TN7fEXRafwZamHpj_Y=)

Abigail

clean_body: How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our mid-month deadline is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally: Tonight's deadline is a big one for our campaign. And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public. If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth. That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big. = = Thank you, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign.
