### _**Please Consider A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/05927c2f-f98c-4fd0-a324-81273bc160a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You. **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.LtuYJfIxT-8DBvnHw7izhQ6eGEtlm-wMTBDpX_Jimoo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171150827)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a42d8d02-dd7f-405d-a705-4dbdb27bff4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
America under Trump, [always an absurdity](https://substack.com/redirect/b2576352-948e-40ef-81c8-5e2c47598a04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has outdone itself yet again.
This week, a judge--bless his grasp of sanity--declared that Sean Dunn, age 37 and formerly employed by the Department of Justice, should not be dragged to the gallows for hurling a Subway sandwich at a federal officer. Yes, a sandwich.
Hotshot Italiano, oven roasted chicken, or veggie delight -- we may never know, for such matters are beneath the investigative abilities of the Trumpian Inquisition masquerading as a Justice Department.
Mr. Dunn's alleged crime? He yelled at federal officers dispatched to the streets of Washington, D.C. and then engaged in a subversive act of culinary dissent.
For this, the tyrannical minds at the DOJ, [flush with Trumpian righteousness and MAGA-colored delusions](https://substack.com/redirect/ca16ff33-89a1-4043-9344-6927fe9e3f65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), decided to charge him with a felony--punishable by eight years in prison, or roughly the same sentence one might get for armed robbery. In a saner land, this would be satire.
In America these days, it is simply Wednesday.
The woman leading this prosecutorial show is none other than Jeannine Pirro, former Fox News host, current D.C. U-S attorney, and longtime consumer of boxed wine.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef52bc28-aca8-457e-aa42-0145b208570e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pirro, along with Pam Bondi--herself[ a walking parody of justice](https://substack.com/redirect/7b0e0b42-5e92-4786-8e7c-a71945a029a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--sought to crucify Mr. Dunn. Not because he posed a threat to society, but because he had the audacity to make their sacred uniformed police enforcers look ridiculous.
Consider the hysterics. The Trump Administration, whose [collective moral compass spins like a roulette wheel](https://substack.com/redirect/6f656bca-539a-49f5-9238-2c2570e3e898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), wept crocodile tears over one sandwich.
Meanwhile, on January 6th, their feral disciples beat police officers with flagpoles, fire extinguishers, and bear spray. Then, on Donald Trump's first day in office this year, Old Man Orange pardoned every single one of them.
Yet Pam Bondi, that bleached sentinel of moral decay, declared on X: "If you touch any law enforcement officer, we will come after you."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e688a62-5d51-49f2-b988-61338f535328?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bold words from a woman whose department coddled January 6th rioters like they were rowdy frat boys instead of [treasonous thugs](https://substack.com/redirect/715f29f4-88cb-4c2c-8ea2-90712d2a9633?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And dare we mention Bondi's whitewashing of the Jeffrey Epstein scandal?
Put it all together and the rule is clear. Hurl a light lunch at a police officer in protest against Trump, Bondi will come after you. But [if you touch a child, or if Donald Trump did](https://substack.com/redirect/49c54e17-a747-463a-ae2d-cf4290baf919?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), she's all good.
Bondi, like so many Trump cultists, is not interested in justice. [She is interested in obedience, the more blind and brutal](https://substack.com/redirect/6f656bca-539a-49f5-9238-2c2570e3e898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the better.
Her proclamations are not grounded in a love of law, but based on her deep and abiding fear that the people might one day laugh too loudly at her, Pirro, and Trump...and possibly throw a tomato.
Let's go back to the facts in the case of Mr. Dunn. Following his verbal tirade, sandwich toss, brief run from the police, and arrest, he confessed to the crime instantly: "I did it, I threw a sandwich," he told the officers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/775acca9-d3a9-4452-ad36-2111ad4aa9ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No police body armor was pierced. No bones were broken. No eyes gouged out. No riot ensued.
Dunn's act was, by every standard known to human civilization, a symbolic gesture--humiliating to the target perhaps, but not harmful. And therein lies the rub: authoritarians fear humiliation more than death.
**It is the one wound that will not heal.**
### _**Please Consider A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/05927c2f-f98c-4fd0-a324-81273bc160a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You. **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.LtuYJfIxT-8DBvnHw7izhQ6eGEtlm-wMTBDpX_Jimoo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171150827)
The Bondi-Pirro cabal, perhaps to make themselves feel better, issued an arrest warrant charging Dunn with felony assault. Then, DOJ goons demanded Dunn be kept in jail. But the judge declared the felony charge was "excessive" and released Dunn on his own recognizance.
Dunn will have his next court appearance in September. Legal experts say he and the prosecutors will likely resolve this at some point with a deal. Dunn will plead guilty to a misdemeanor and perhaps pay a dry-cleaning fine.
In the meantime, Bondi keeps insisting that Dunn's action was an assault on government itself.
She thundered on X that Dunn "is [an example of the deep state](https://substack.com/redirect/7b0e0b42-5e92-4786-8e7c-a71945a029a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) we have been up against for seven months as we work to refocus DOJ. You will not work in this administration while disrespecting our government and law enforcement."
Unless, of course, you work for Pam Bondi.
Multiple news organizations recently reported that Bondi hired a J6 rioter named Jared Wise as a senior advisor at DOJ. Five years ago, during the capitol insurrection, police body cameras recorded Wise calling officers "Nazis." Wise also urged fellow rioters to attack the police and "kill them."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbbadd6e-6b30-4058-8119-0ef6e0554f46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bondi's office issued a statement saying, "Jared Wise is a valued member of the Justice department, and we appreciate his contributions to our team."
In any rational republic, Pam Bondi would be laughed off the public stage and sentenced to a long, contemplative retirement. Preferably [in a quiet padded room far from the temptation of Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/37ca08da-dda9-4a14-82a5-7ddefbaffb18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Instead, Bondi maintains her power -- a dangerous thing in the hands of someone so breathtakingly unburdened by introspection.
If there is one immutable law in American politics, it is this: **the loudest champions of law and order are often the first to trample on both when they 're inconvenient.**
And in the GOP, [justice, like patriotism, is a costume](https://substack.com/redirect/6d9f208e-1e97-4381-bd06-4b2fb6f36f26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to be worn or discarded depending on the audience. And Pam Bondi never runs out of outfits.
All of this is a reminder that a liberal who throws a sandwich will face prosecution, while MAGA conservatives who beat police will walk free. [The hypocrisy is not a glitch of this administration ](https://substack.com/redirect/7a58eab2-fe95-4830-a9a5-d010b653a736?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[but its founding principle](https://substack.com/redirect/7a58eab2-fe95-4830-a9a5-d010b653a736?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8586106f-9037-4b4d-8a80-6ab3cf35e9b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If our republic falls, it won't be due to tanks in the streets or because of a lunatic President. It will be thanks to enablers like Bondi--the Trump sycophants [who treat the constitution like a napkin to wipe their mouths](https://substack.com/redirect/f06431e8-11a0-4882-954e-e1a0371f25fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with after a feast.
Still, let us thank Sean Dunn. Not for his Subway sandwich and his aim, but for his unwillingness to bow before the pedestal of tyrants.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c825c7ef-5608-4689-a8fb-227a3bebd151?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Perhaps Dunn did not change history. But he did, in a delicious moment, expose the Trump team's utter insanity.

clean_body: A Trump Administration that makes us all wanna toss our lunch finally finds an insurrection in Washington | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A Trump Administration that makes us all wanna toss our lunch finally finds an insurrection in Washington | | | Aug 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Please Consider A. Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You. By David Shuster | | ---|---|--- America under Trump, , has outdone itself yet again. This week, a judge--bless his grasp of sanity--declared that Sean Dunn, age 37 and formerly employed by the Department of Justice, should not be dragged to the gallows for hurling a Subway sandwich at a federal officer. Yes, a sandwich. Hotshot Italiano, oven roasted chicken, or veggie delight -- we may never know, for such matters are beneath the investigative abilities of the Trumpian Inquisition masquerading as a Justice Department. Mr. Dunn's alleged crime? He yelled at federal officers dispatched to the streets of Washington, D.C. and then engaged in a subversive act of culinary dissent. For this, the tyrannical minds at the DOJ, , decided to charge him with a felony--punishable by eight years in prison, or roughly the same sentence one might get for armed robbery. In a saner land, this would be satire. In America these days, it is simply Wednesday. The woman leading this prosecutorial show is none other than Jeannine Pirro, former Fox News host, current D.C. U-S attorney, and longtime consumer of boxed wine. | | ---|---|--- Pirro, along with Pam Bondi--herself to crucify Mr. Dunn. Not because he posed a threat to society, but because he had the audacity to make their sacred uniformed police enforcers look ridiculous. Consider the hysterics. The Trump Administration, whose , wept crocodile tears over one sandwich. Meanwhile, on January 6th, their feral disciples beat police officers with flagpoles, fire extinguishers, and bear spray. Then, on Donald Trump's first day in office this year, Old Man Orange pardoned every single one of them. Yet Pam Bondi, that bleached sentinel of moral decay, declared on X: "If you touch any law enforcement officer, we will come after you." | | ---|---|--- Bold words from a woman whose department coddled January 6th rioters like they were rowdy frat boys instead of . And dare we mention Bondi's whitewashing of the Jeffrey Epstein scandal? Put it all together and the rule is clear. Hurl a light lunch at a police officer in protest against Trump, Bondi will come after you. But , she's all good. Bondi, like so many Trump cultists, is not interested in justice. , the better. Her proclamations are not grounded in a love of law, but based on her deep and abiding fear that the people might one day laugh too loudly at her, Pirro, and Trump...and possibly throw a tomato. Let's go back to the facts in the case of Mr. Dunn. Following his verbal tirade, sandwich toss, brief run from the police, and arrest, he confessed to the crime instantly: "I did it, I threw a sandwich," he told the officers. | | ---|---|--- No police body armor was pierced. No bones were broken. No eyes gouged out. No riot ensued. Dunn's act was, by every standard known to human civilization, a symbolic gesture--humiliating to the target perhaps, but not harmful. And therein lies the rub: authoritarians fear humiliation more than death. It is the one wound that will not heal. Please Consider A. Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You. The Bondi-Pirro cabal, perhaps to make themselves feel better, issued an arrest warrant charging Dunn with felony assault. Then, DOJ goons demanded Dunn be kept in jail. But the judge declared the felony charge was "excessive" and released Dunn on his own recognizance. Dunn will have his next court appearance in September. Legal experts say he and the prosecutors will likely resolve this at some point with a deal. Dunn will plead guilty to a misdemeanor and perhaps pay a dry-cleaning fine. In the meantime, Bondi keeps insisting that Dunn's action was an assault on government itself. She thundered on X that Dunn "is we have been up against for seven months as we work to refocus DOJ. You will not work in this administration while disrespecting our government and law enforcement." Unless, of course, you work for Pam Bondi. Multiple news organizations recently reported that Bondi hired a J6 rioter named Jared Wise as a senior advisor at DOJ. Five years ago, during the capitol insurrection, police body cameras recorded Wise calling officers "Nazis." Wise also urged fellow rioters to attack the police and "kill them." | | ---|---|--- Bondi's office issued a statement saying, "Jared Wise is a valued member of the Justice department, and we appreciate his contributions to our team." In any rational republic, Pam Bondi would be laughed off the public stage and sentenced to a long, contemplative retirement. Preferably . Instead, Bondi maintains her power -- a dangerous thing in the hands of someone so breathtakingly unburdened by introspection. If there is one immutable law in American politics, it is this: the loudest champions of law and order are often the first to trample on both when they 're inconvenient. And in the GOP, to be worn or discarded depending on the audience. And Pam Bondi never runs out of outfits. All of this is a reminder that a liberal who throws a sandwich will face prosecution, while MAGA conservatives who beat police will walk free. . | | ---|---|--- If our republic falls, it won't be due to tanks in the streets or because of a lunatic President. It will be thanks to enablers like Bondi--the Trump sycophants with after a feast. Still, let us thank Sean Dunn. Not for his Subway sandwich and his aim, but for his unwillingness to bow before the pedestal of tyrants. | | ---|---|--- Perhaps Dunn did not change history. But he did, in a delicious moment, expose the Trump team's utter insanity. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Please Consider A. Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. body:
Friend, I’m so grateful for everyone who took the time to commit to voting in the crucial midterm elections next November. **But I’m still looking for another 97 folks to add their name by midnight.**
---
The fight for control of Congress is going to be close, which means every last vote will matter. This is our chance to take back power from Republicans so we can hold Trump accountable and put a stop to his reckless and dangerous Project 2025 agenda once and for all – and it’s a chance we cannot afford to miss.
**So please, before midnight, I need to know if I can count on you to raise your voice alongside this team on Election Day:[If you haven’t already, will you add your name now to commit to voting in the midterm elections, help Democrats retake the Senate, and put a stop to Trump’s Project 2025 agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113455035/563825193/962606383?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5571-su-nd&refcode=jtk5571-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2EwZDkyOC1lODdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cmap4PGZNQ46dluLhHrUkETJtVAOa0QyJj0T0-kqm_c=&emci=8b14ff24-5278-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=87a0d928-e87a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**

Thank you,
Rev. Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: Can I count on you to vote in the midterm elections?
| | |
---
Friend,
At every turn, Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have made it clear as day: They are _not_ working for everyday folks.
But at no point was this _more_ clear than when they passed their disastrous budget bill – raising costs on virtually every American, stripping millions of their health care, and taking food away from hungry children. The same bill that includes a multi-trillion-dollar giveaway to billionaires and corporations.
It’s shameful.
Trump and his Republican allies in Congress truly believe they can sell out the American people to deliver a windfall to the special interests who fund their campaigns – all without paying any political consequences. **The midterm elections are our opportunity to prove them wrong. **
But if we’re going to vote them out so we can finally put a stop to their reckless and dangerous agenda, each and every one of us needs to raise our voices at the ballot box. **That’s why I’m asking every supporter I have to sign their name by midnight and commit to voting in the midterm elections. I’m counting on you, friend.**
[**So please: Add your name now to commit to voting in the 2026 midterm elections to help Democrats retake the Senate, flip the House, and put a stop to Trump’s Project 2025 agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113455037/563825195/962606383?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5571-su-nd&refcode=jtk5571-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2EwZDkyOC1lODdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cmap4PGZNQ46dluLhHrUkETJtVAOa0QyJj0T0-kqm_c=&emci=8b14ff24-5278-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=87a0d928-e87a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
| | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113455038/563825196/962606383?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5571-su-nd&refcode=jtk5571-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2EwZDkyOC1lODdhLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cmap4PGZNQ46dluLhHrUkETJtVAOa0QyJj0T0-kqm_c=&emci=8b14ff24-5278-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=87a0d928-e87a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
---
Now is not the time to give in to those who are trying to rob us of hope. Now is the time to stand up, stay strong, and commit to the fight ahead. The power is in the people. And together, we will win.
Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: | ~ Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers from last month, and I was stunned. $17.48. That was our average donation in July. It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it. Remember when nobody thought my progressive campaign could win in DeSantis’s Florida? Thanks to generous people like you giving just $17.48, we’ve been able to defy the odds and build a real youth-powered movement whose influence stretches across Florida. So, I hate asking for money, but the stakes are too high for me not to reach out. I know that our movement has real momentum, and if we can hit every fundraising goal – we can flip Florida blue. But it doesn't happen if I can’t count on you, Peter. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today?** | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. clean_body: Peter, . You and I might be the only thing between Pres. Trump and another IMPEACHMENT. . . . In case you hadn't heard, the lunatic Democrats are cooking up another scheme to REMOVE President Trump from office. . Sen. Jon Ossoff, one of the most rabid liberals on Earth, is running his mouth and leading the charge. . But here's the good news. . I 'm running against Ossoff and I plan to give him a Southern whoopin' that he'll never forget. . This is Congressman Mike Collins. . I'll make this quick. I'm a 100% America-First former trucker and I might be the last chance to protect our President from another impeachment. . If I lose and the Swamp wins, they'll go after Trump, you, and anyone who dares to fight back. . . . Ossoff has George Soros and the D.C. Elite on his side, but I have you. . PLEASE, just a couple bucks could mean the difference in stopping ANOTHER Trump impeachment hoax: . We can't let this Radical Left foot soldier gain any momentum. . . . I 'm asking hat in hand, could you spare a few bucks? Thank you, Rep. **2025 ELECTION ALERT:** _**Critical seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for grabs in November.[Donate now to support our endorsed Democracy Defenders and fight for fair maps >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113455172/563825705/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PADemDefenders_email_20250816-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefenders_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250816-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefenders_&utm_campaign=PADemDefenders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNzVkNDMzLWVjN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e9NuNfues35AC6XQpR62nicu4McoLGKURDCnwQ0A5xs=)**_ Hey Peter — We just announced our official endorsement of three new Democracy Defenders in the critical state supreme court races coming up this November in Pennsylvania! **Justice Christine Donohue, Justice Kevin Dougherty, and Justice David Wecht** have each demonstrated their commitment to protecting free and fair elections, safeguarding fundamental rights, and holding corporations accountable. They have proven they will always put Pennsylvanians and the rule of law first.
**This is particularly important in Pennsylvania, a key battleground state with a recent history of gerrymandering.** In 2021, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court stepped in to redraw new electoral maps after the governor repeatedly vetoed gerrymandered maps drawn by the then-Republican legislature. Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court is a critical line of defense in protecting voters’ rights to “free and equal” elections as outlined in the state constitution — particularly since Pennsylvania lacks an independent redistricting commission that oversees congressional redistricting. **This November, Pennsylvanians must choose to retain Justice Donohue, Justice Dougherty, and Justice Wecht** to ensure continued balance on the court and defend against potential gerrymandering efforts in the future. [**We’re doing everything we can to make sure democracy wins in Pennsylvania and across the country — and your contributions, especially right now, go directly toward making sure we’re able to fight whatever redistricting battles lie ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113455173/563825706/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PADemDefenders_email_20250816-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefenders_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250816-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefenders_&utm_campaign=PADemDefenders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNzVkNDMzLWVjN2EtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e9NuNfues35AC6XQpR62nicu4McoLGKURDCnwQ0A5xs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: An essential line of defense against gerrymandering in PA | 2025 ELECTION ALERT: Critical seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for grabs in November.= Hey Peter — We just announced our official endorsement of three new Democracy Defenders in the critical state supreme court races coming up this November in Pennsylvania! Justice Christine Donohue, Justice Kevin Dougherty, and Justice David Wecht have each demonstrated their commitment to protecting free and fair elections, safeguarding fundamental rights, and holding corporations accountable. They have proven they will always put Pennsylvanians and the rule of law first. This is particularly important in Pennsylvania, a key battleground state with a recent history of gerrymandering. In 2021, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court stepped in to redraw new electoral maps after the governor repeatedly vetoed gerrymandered maps drawn by the then-Republican legislature. Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court is a critical line of defense in protecting voters’ rights to “free and equal” elections as outlined in the state constitution — particularly since Pennsylvania lacks an independent redistricting commission that oversees congressional redistricting. This November, Pennsylvanians must choose to retain Justice Donohue, Justice Dougherty, and Justice Wecht to ensure continued balance on the court and defend against potential gerrymandering efforts in the future. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Remember — the work we do makes a huge impact in the most important decisions being made that affect whether people can make their voice heard. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: I'll never apologize for loving America.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I stare down radical leftists, my message is clear
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21582516/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRVZFSFBLakQ2RA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTY/LbmNsUEVYSUdseA/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTbzZEVDhZNU1scw/gaKEFDw/sbne8a8a587)
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Dear Patriot,
**_I'll never apologize for loving America._**

When I stare down radical leftists, my message is clear: this is the greatest nation on Earth, and I'll defend it with every breath.

When I signed up to serve in the Air Force, it was because I knew this was the **GREATEST** country on Earth and I would lay down my life for it.

But Democrats? They can't stop spewing their lies about how “terrible” our country is.
_**I've had it.**_

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
I'm a proud Air Force veteran and Congresswoman, charging into the **MOST CRUCIAL** battle of 2026: taking down the anti-American Democrats.

I **FLIPPED** my district in 2022 and Democrats will stop at nothing to get it back.
Radical Democrats are pouring **MILLIONS** into defeating me — but with your help, we’ll stop them cold and crush their plan.
Your hard work has paid off tremendously, but truth be told we aren’t out of the woods yet.

With midterms approaching, the Left has upped their attacks against the **MAGA** movement to a truly ungodly level!

I’m not the type of person to back down from a fight, but this is a battle I can’t win on my own.
[STAND WITH ME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
God bless,

**Rep. Anna Paulina Luna**

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
_American First. Always.
_

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
|
---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

SURE](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/RjWZSyXsKPNcOT9PT9S1FS5zFPacbQ690XX7nXRgdTDbePqt-j2EYKvdREA7HmjqsENmr7KPL-3wp3nWmuALl6ZsVrp0XkY5ZjnrvbptVWXxwYHPX1fwFtb_1HMGcow0L658XnkrXsxamLgw1FqLF0GZflGx814QgFjp9vXKpFHxldh7H3pxgWko_KD8y3oKlzF4MwYBSUIL7314Es__6cP0eZ4u-6eyUWHpfJTgYt7U00SuEQm7XiSnrmOro2tyYiF8ojX-JfqJO6w6Ud6al3n_uf2PTv0r5gotjf7_0o8VgkieeJdVlLA_Fkp_vX-YCbWK5RoU8TOt8aNOs0NVyrO27Ts9MFK6_uglt3tO3gSBYVK7UHVLtqzk76_bFKBSbPHGO6NJ20YAesyTS2YZgiSlUREQA7PiL-M8K9IE80qkNLq2OosraVgyt_s2kpaSG54-IssBkd_0KwxoeIN5eSFNcygQWimisvnkVdbKMSSipy76TRST1KctBvI1DHRPGDBZELZZHNMx-dC6NfzOigvTH798RaujuEH6uMDsytyX0nB8v19Dalp4VuBQmRWaCxgmjxonRXvew18hR7ubcaAGIU4XAwWc5o7mY5Y1Izd0vPPtd2qiaLGiNoteLwmTCaAN_ctIPOz36lu2BMdRJfontC5JjpbnnOUp4fa2KThL8F6Nt4M3JGU/pE6JpfIcOAqb5OLWXZhAl_OxzLlq25ZM/11) Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/T2WPcGloA1J3JQWZPCcMnv46U0y6xnFvCOlbOaSWbZl5D52djvwjcz872jf_DCljqEZf3atHpgi40rnoeXl7oSlOqgR3u04GOdaLxvFYeyyAXzgjOZfFcKnbX3yt8Uhdhp2sctUUVFjemlWQ7xUUCXzNeABmjnIb-8r9pf_DG5lt0G2Q9kIQI9mcGdqvrSfpxul49Ypxa-H3yXAMYxP0b3sDle3MnYYiXMxD0fDQ93Xvq0e_i_Q5GLMOFHLhw6USB_gekdKxZXzIoL4ctbzWuVytCxCRBxNzKjnWp0A_jRoMC3MHnTCM62syutHIfuKhqVVcap_x1yq16mYoVyaig3jTIdhRnsJpa9z5NSIiMgZs2BPC169us9Q_nJua8BI5pZzVenIyVNDm6PHXHaxElTeCOWIQJ8-qrpp-3JrUbMGBkeCoIg4n-8W4_wJ3RO6kF9E8jS0HWCame5qoHwN0E38Gzpbb9IPMwzJld5P5tMnHe_oMBuxutyLynymQ4H1kOMnMb1RNSnHTtaybEw95JMqwczXR7uSIopJcEUaWbeil_rLaSb1z1WNiLo93NsRIh1pW28Wnbs4efgna2jD9Ww13Gw4TikngYWV3rdsG33GJteG_gJP2-qnj0FMAbB0GhYYvPKPJzyyacYQG2hY4N2FXT-WTnXaRMBrKJvFsPlo63kkwCtWsn6g/kOQY2U4ajd7fG1efBa7GWRvc-QN3zT6i/11) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** The Second Amendment is under attack. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! clean_body: The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite... | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment. Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Peter ,
Donald Trump has sent the National Guard into Washington, D.C., after already deploying troops in Los Angeles, and his team is saying out loud what we all know: this is just the beginning.
This isn’t about “crime.” Crime is down in D.C. This is about Trump normalizing military crackdowns on American soil, targeting Democratic cities, immigrants, unhoused people, and anyone who dares oppose him.
Jeanine Pirro, Trump’s handpicked enforcer and former Fox News talking head, promised, “Make no mistake, this is just the beginning.” And Trump himself threatened Chicago, Oakland, and Baltimore as next.
We can’t sugarcoat it: Trump has a government stacked with loyalists ready to unleash troops on American citizens. This is the kind of behavior we see from North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un!
The only way we can begin to claw back our country is to ensure Democrats win in 2026 and restore a real check on his power. But we need to start now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08162025&amount=25]

name: Live Poll via StateDemocrats.com
subject: Do you watch PBS, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Millions of Americans rely on their local PBS station for news, education programming, and so much more.
#

**Do you watch PBS?** | [YES, I WATCH PBS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93882?t=1&akid=9289%2E614464%2EQ12NvL) [NO, I DON’T WATCH PBS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93882?t=2&akid=9289%2E614464%2EQ12NvL)
---
Here’s what happened, Peter:
**FIRST —** Donald Trump + MAGA Republicans in Congress announced their effort to cut more than a BILLION DOLLARS from PBS + NPR.
**THEN —** They actually did it. Earlier this summer, they officially cut $1.1 BILLION in federal funding for public broadcasters on radio + TV across the country.
**NOW — These cuts mean that PBS + NPR stations, especially in rural areas, are at risk of shuttering.**
Millions of Americans rely on their local PBS station for news, educational programming, and so much more. **So today, we’re asking you to confirm with us:**
**Do you watch PBS?**
[YES, I WATCH PBS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93882?t=3&akid=9289%2E614464%2EQ12NvL) [NO, I DON’T WATCH PBS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93882?t=4&akid=9289%2E614464%2EQ12NvL)
---

---

name: NICE TRY, lol
subject: Abbott called another. We won’t blink.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Isaiah Martin for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Minutes after the first special session ended, Greg Abbott called a second one to jam through a mid-decade power grab. The House is still frozen because Democrats left the state to block a rigged map.
Abbott’s agenda is the same: redistricting first, plus culture-war bills he could not pass in daylight. I’m talking about an abortion-pill crackdown and a “bathroom bill,” on top of hemp and THC bans. This is not governance. It is a rush to rig.
Here’s the good news. The walkout bought time. California moved to fight fire with fire with a counter-map designed to neutralize Abbott’s scheme. When they try to pick their voters, we organize, litigate, and win.
I’ll stand with the Democrats who put their bodies on the line. I’ll fight for fair maps and real voting rights. I won’t let Trump’s pressure campaign decide who gets a voice in Texas.
Protect Fair Maps. Defend Voting Rights. Texas deserves elections where voters pick politicians, not the other way around.
ALERT: A second special session means a renewed push for a rigged map. This is the playbook of Abbott and Trump .
We are standing up to power grabs, fighting in the courts and in the streets, and organizing neighbors to protect our voice. Together, we can stop the rush to silence Texans and keep our democracy strong.
✅ Protect fair maps and equal representation
✅ Defend voting rights in every community
✅ Power legal action and rapid grassroots organizing
Chip In to Stop the Power Grab [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?]
🔒 Secure ActBlue link

name: DNC HQ
subject: Our road to taking back the Senate
